    37→/**
    38→ * FFmpeg 分段转录服务 - 使用 FFmpeg Kit 处理大视频文件
    39→ *
    40→ * 增强功能：
    41→ * - 支持取消：检查协程状态，随时响应取消请求
    42→ * - 智能分段：基于静音检测和文件大小的自适应分段
    43→ * - 重试机制：每个段失败后自动重试
    44→ * - 超时控制：防止段处理卡死
    45→ * - 剩余时间估算：实时显示预计完成时间
    46→ * - 内存优化：流式处理大文件，不一次性加载
    47→ *
    48→ * 参考 GitHub 项目：
    49→ * - WritingMinds/ffmpeg-kit: Android FFmpeg 支持
    50→ * - gvk7/Whisper-Ffmpeg-Multi-Segment: 多段 Whisper 转录
    51→ * - wendy7756/AI-Video-Transcriber: 20分钟分段策略
    52→ */
    53→@Singleton
    54→class FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService @Inject constructor(
    55→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context,
    56→    private val whisperService: WhisperService
    57→) {
    58→    companion object {
    59→        private const val TAG = "FFmpegSegmentTrans"
    60→        // Groq API 文件大小限制（调整为安全值）
    61→        private const val MAX_API_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024L // 25MB（Groq 实际限制）
    62→        // 音频段目标大小（留出安全余量）
    63→        private const val TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE = 20 * 1024 * 1024L // 20MB
    64→        // 分段转录的时长阈值（秒）- 超过此时长使用分段转录
    65→        private const val SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD = 180.0 // 3分钟（降低阈值）
    66→        // 最小分段时长（秒）- 避免分段太小
    67→        private const val MIN_SEGMENT_DURATION = 120L // 2分钟
    68→        // 分段时长（秒）- 增加到10分钟减少总段数
    69→        private const val SEGMENT_DURATION = 600L // 10分钟（原300秒）
    70→        // 段间重叠时间（秒）- 减少重叠提高速度
    71→        private const val OVERLAP_DURATION = 1L // 1秒（原2秒）
    72→        // 临时文件目录
    73→        private const val TEMP_DIR = "transcription_temp"
    74→        // 最大重试次数 - 减少重试次数加快失败响应
    75→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 2 // 2次（原3次）
    76→        // 重试延迟（毫秒）- 指数退避
    77→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS = 1000L
    78→        // 段提取超时（秒）
    79→        private const val EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC = 300L  // 5分钟超时
    80→        // 段转录超时（秒）- 根据段长度动态计算
    81→        private const val TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN = 120L // 每分钟音频最多2分钟
    82→        // 总转录超时（秒）- 防止卡死
    83→        private const val TOTAL_TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC = 3600L // 60分钟超时
    84→        // 并行处理数量 - 增加到8个并行转录加快速度
    85→        private const val PARALLEL_SEGMENTS = 8 // 8个（原4个）
    86→        // API请求间隔（毫秒）- 减少间隔加快速度
    87→        private const val API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS = 300L // 300ms（原500ms）
    88→        // 进度更新频率（段数）
    89→        private const val PROGRESS_UPDATE_INTERVAL = 1
    90→        // 快速语言检测片段时长（秒）- 40秒确保足够检测语言
    91→        private const val LANG_DETECT_DURATION = 40.0
    92→    }
    93→
    94→    /**
    95→     * 根据网络类型估算速度，动态计算最优分段时长
    96→     */
    97→    private fun calculateOptimalSegmentDuration(): Long {
    98→        try {
    99→            val cm = context.getSystemService(Context.CONNECTIVITY_SERVICE) as ConnectivityManager
   100→            val network = cm.activeNetwork ?: return SEGMENT_DURATION
   101→            val caps = cm.getNetworkCapabilities(network) ?: return SEGMENT_DURATION
   102→
   103→            val upBandwidth = caps.linkUpstreamBandwidthKbps
   104→
   105→            Log.d(TAG, "Network upstream bandwidth: ${upBandwidth}kbps")
   106→
   107→            return when {
   108→                upBandwidth > 8000 -> 600L   // >1MB/s: 10分钟
   109→                upBandwidth > 4000 -> 480L   // >500KB/s: 8分钟
   110→                upBandwidth > 1600 -> 360L   // >200KB/s: 6分钟
   111→                else -> 300L                  // 慢速: 5分钟
   112→            }
   113→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   114→            Log.w(TAG, "Failed to detect network speed, using default", e)
   115→            return SEGMENT_DURATION
   116→        }
   117→    }
   118→
   119→    /**
   120→     * 分段转录进度数据 - 增强版
   121→     */
   122→    data class SegmentProgress(
   123→        val currentSegment: Int,
   124→        val totalSegments: Int,
   125→        val percent: Int,
   126→        val message: String,
   127→        val remainingSeconds: Long = 0,
   128→        val estimatedCompletionTime: Long = 0,
   129→        // 新增：详细的分段状态
   130→        val segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState> = emptyMap()
   131→    )
   132→
   133→    /**
   134→     * 分段状态
   135→     */
   136→    data class SegmentState(
   137→        val index: Int,
   138→        val status: SegmentStatus,
   139→        val message: String = ""
   140→    )
   141→
   142→    enum class SegmentStatus {
   143→        PENDING,       // 等待处理
   144→        EXTRACTING,    // 提取音频中
   145→        EXTRACTED,     // 音频提取完成
   146→        TRANSCRIBING,  // 转录中
   147→        COMPLETED,     // 完成
   148→        FAILED,        // 失败
   149→        CANCELLED       // 已取消
   150→    }
   151→
   152→    /**
   153→     * 分段转录视频
   154→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
   155→     * @param config AI配置
   156→     * @param lang 视频语言代码（如 "en", "ru", "ja" 等），null 表示自动检测
   157→     * @param onProgress 进度回调 (当前段, 总段数, 百分比, 消息, 剩余秒数)
   158→     */
   159→    suspend fun transcribeWithSegments(
   160→        videoFile: File,
   161→        config: AIConfig,
   162→        lang: String? = null,
   163→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _, _ -> }
   164→    ): WhisperResult? = withTimeout(TOTAL_TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   165→        try {
   166→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
   167→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
   168→
   169→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting segmented transcription: ${videoFile.name}, $fileSizeMB MB")
   170→            onProgress(0, 1, 5, "获取视频信息...", 0)
   171→
   172→            // 获取视频时长和详细信息
   173→            val mediaInfo = getMediaInformation(videoFile)
   174→
   175→            // 尝试解析时长，兼容多种格式
   176→            val duration = try {
   177→                val durationStr = mediaInfo?.getDuration()
   178→                when {
   179→                    durationStr == null -> null
   180→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+")) -> durationStr.toLongOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   181→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+\\.\\d+")) -> durationStr.toDoubleOrNull()
   182→                    else -> {
   183→                        Log.e(TAG, "Invalid duration format: $durationStr")
   184→                        null
   185→                    }
   186→                }
   187→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   188→                Log.e(TAG, "Error parsing duration: $mediaInfo", e)
   189→                null
   190→            }
   191→
   192→            if (duration == null) {
   193→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
   194→                return@withTimeout WhisperResult(
   195→                    success = false,
   196→                    error = "无法读取视频时长，请确保视频文件有效。\n\nFFmpeg 错误: ${mediaInfo?.getAllProperties()}"
   197→                )
   198→            }
   199→
   200→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
   201→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: $durationMinutes minutes ($duration seconds), file size: $fileSizeMB MB")
   202→
   203→            // 判断处理策略 - 基于时长而不是文件大小
   204→            return@withTimeout when {
   205→                duration <= SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD && fileSize <= MAX_API_FILE_SIZE -> {
   206→                    // 时长较短且文件在API限制内，先压缩音频再转录
   207→                    Log.d(TAG, "Direct transcription with compression (duration: ${duration.toInt()}s, size: ${fileSizeMB}MB)")
   208→                    onProgress(1, 1, 10, "压缩音频...", 0)
   209→
   210→                    // 先压缩音频
   211→                    val compressedFile = compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile)
   212→                    if (compressedFile == null) {
   213→                        Log.e(TAG, "Failed to compress audio, trying original file")
   214→                        onProgress(1, 1, 20, "直接转录中...", 0)
   215→                        whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config, lang)
   216→                    } else {
   217→                        Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${compressedFile.length()} bytes")
   218→                        onProgress(1, 1, 30, "转录中...", 0)
   219→                        val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(compressedFile, config, lang)
   220→                        // 删除临时压缩文件
   221→                        compressedFile.delete()
   222→                        result
   223→                    }
   224→                }
   225→                else -> {
   226→                    // 时长较长或文件过大，需要分段处理
   227→                    val reason = if (duration > SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD) {
   228→                        "video duration exceeds ${SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD.toInt()/60} minutes"
   229→                    } else {
   230→                        "file size exceeds ${MAX_API_FILE_SIZE/1024/1024}MB"
   231→                    }
   232→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription: $reason")
   233→                    transcribeSegmentedInternal(videoFile, config, duration, lang, onProgress)
   234→                }
   235→            }
   236→
   237→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   238→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   239→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   240→            WhisperResult(
   241→                success = false,
   242→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n详细日志已输出到 logcat"
   243→            )
   244→        }
   245→    }
   246→
   247→    /**
   248→     * 内部分段转录实现 - 流水线模式（边提取边转录，提高速度）
   249→     *
   250→     * 优化策略：
   251→     * - 第一段：提取 → 转录 → 检测语言（串行，确保精确）
   252→     * - 后续段：生产者串行提取，消费者并行转录，通过 Channel 流水线衔接
   253→     * - 提取一段完成后立即可被转录，无需等待全部提取完毕
   254→     */
   255→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentedInternal(
   256→        videoFile: File,
   257→        config: AIConfig,
   258→        duration: Double,
   259→        lang: String?,
   260→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   261→    ): WhisperResult? = coroutineScope {
   262→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting pipeline segmented transcription, duration: ${duration}s")
   263→        ensureActive()
   264→
   265→        val dynamicDuration = calculateOptimalSegmentDuration()
   266→        Log.d(TAG, "Dynamic segment duration: ${dynamicDuration}s based on network speed")
   267→        val segments = calculateSegments(duration, videoFile.length(), dynamicDuration)
   268→        val totalSegments = segments.size
   269→
   270→        Log.d(TAG, "Will process in $totalSegments segments (pipeline mode, parallel: $PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)")
   271→        onProgress(0, totalSegments, 10, "准备处理 $totalSegments 个分段...", 0)
   272→
   273→        val segmentStates = mutableMapOf<Int, SegmentState>()
   274→        segments.forEachIndexed { index, _ ->
   275→            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.PENDING)
   276→        }
   277→
   278→        val tempDir = File(context.cacheDir, "$TEMP_DIR${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   279→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   280→
   281→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   282→        val segmentTimes = mutableMapOf<Int, Long>()
   283→
   284→        return@coroutineScope try {
   285→            val allWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   286→            var failedSegments = 0
   287→            val successSegments = mutableListOf<Int>()
   288→            val completedIndices = mutableListOf<Int>()
   289→            val transcriptionMutex = Mutex()
   290→
   291→            // === 快速语言检测：只提取前30秒，快速检测语言 ===
   292→            var effectiveLang = lang
   293→            var contextPrompt: String? = null  // 上下文 prompt，传给后续段提高质量
   294→
   295→            if (effectiveLang == null && segments.isNotEmpty()) {
   296→                val probeFile = File(tempDir, "lang_probe.ogg")
   297→                val probeDuration = minOf(LANG_DETECT_DURATION, segments[0].duration)
   298→
   299→                segmentStates[0] = SegmentState(0, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "快速语言检测...")
   300→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 12, "快速语言检测...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   301→
   302→                val probeSuccess = withTimeout(60_000L) {
   303→                    extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, probeFile, segments[0].startTime, probeDuration, -1)
   304→                }
   305→
   306→                if (probeSuccess && probeFile.exists()) {
   307→                    val probeResult = try {
   308→                        withTimeout(60_000L) {
   309→                            whisperService.transcribeGroq(probeFile, config, null, null)
   310→                        }
   311→                    } catch (e: Exception) {
   312→                        Log.e(TAG, "Language probe failed", e)
   313→                        null
   314→                    }
   315→
   316→                    if (probeResult?.success == true && probeResult.detectedLang.isNotBlank()) {
   317→                        effectiveLang = LANG_NAME_TO_CODE[probeResult.detectedLang.lowercase()]
   318→                            ?: probeResult.detectedLang.lowercase().take(2)
   319→                        // 提取最后几句话作为上下文 prompt
   320→                        val probeText = probeResult.text.trim()
   321→                        contextPrompt = if (probeText.length > 200) probeText.takeLast(200) else probeText
   322→                        Log.d(TAG, "Quick language detection: ${probeResult.detectedLang} -> $effectiveLang")
   323→                    } else {
   324→                        Log.w(TAG, "Language probe inconclusive, using auto-detect")
   325→                    }
   326→                }
   327→                probeFile.delete()
   328→
   329→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 15,
   330→                    "语言: ${effectiveLang ?: "auto"}, 开始流水线...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   331→            }
   332→
   333→            // === 全部段：流水线模式（边提取边转录）===
   334→            val remainingIndices = segments.indices.toList()
   335→            ensureActive()
   336→
   337→            if (remainingIndices.isNotEmpty()) {
   338→                // Channel 缓冲2段，让提取可以领先转录
   339→                val channel = Channel<Pair<Int, File>>(capacity = 2)
   340→                val semaphore = Semaphore(PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)
   341→
   342→                // 生产者：串行提取音频段
   343→                val producerJob = launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   344→                    try {
   345→                        for (index in remainingIndices) {
   346→                            ensureActive()
   347→                            val segment = segments[index]
   348→                            val segmentFile = File(tempDir, "segment_${index}.ogg")
   349→
   350→                            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "提取音频中...")
   351→                            transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   352→                                val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   353→                                val progress = 35 + (completedCount * 55 / totalSegments)
   354→                                updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   355→                                    "提取段 ${index + 1}...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   356→                            }
   357→
   358→                            val extractSuccess = withTimeout(EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   359→                                extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, segmentFile, segment.startTime, segment.duration, index)
   360→                            }
   361→
   362→                            if (extractSuccess && segmentFile.exists()) {
   363→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTED, "等待转录...")
   364→                                Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index extracted, sending to pipeline")
   365→                                channel.send(index to segmentFile)
   366→                            } else {
   367→                                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to extract segment $index")
   368→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, "音频提取失败")
   369→                                failedSegments++
   370→                            }
   371→                        }
   372→                    } finally {
   373→                        channel.close()
   374→                    }
   375→                }
   376→
   377→                // 消费者：并行转录
   378→                val consumerJobs = (1..PARALLEL_SEGMENTS).map {
   379→                    async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   380→                        for ((index, segmentFile) in channel) {
   381→                            semaphore.withPermit {
   382→                                ensureActive()
   383→                                val segment = segments[index]
   384→                                val segmentStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   385→
   386→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "转录中...")
   387→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   388→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   389→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, 35 + (completedCount * 55 / totalSegments),
   390→                                        "段 ${index + 1} 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   391→                                }
   392→
   393→                                val transcriptionTimeout = (segment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   394→                                val result = try {
   395→                                    withTimeout(transcriptionTimeout) {
   396→                                        transcribeSegmentWithRetry(segmentFile, config, index, segment.duration, effectiveLang, contextPrompt)
   397→                                    }
   398→                                } catch (e: CancellationException) {
   399→                                    throw e
   400→                                } catch (e: Exception) {
   401→                                    Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription timeout/error", e)
   402→                                    null
   403→                                }
   404→
   405→                                val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - segmentStartTime
   406→                                segmentTimes[index] = transcriptionTime
   407→
   408→                                if (result?.success == true) {
   409→                                    val adjustedWords = result.words.map { wt ->
   410→                                        wt.copy(s = wt.s + segment.startTime, e = wt.e + segment.startTime)
   411→                                    }
   412→
   413→                                    transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   414→                                        if (index > 0) {
   415→                                            val overlapThreshold = segment.startTime - OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   416→                                            allWords.addAll(adjustedWords.filter { it.s >= overlapThreshold })
   417→                                        } else {
   418→                                            allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   419→                                        }
   420→                                        completedIndices.add(index)
   421→                                        successSegments.add(index)
   422→
   423→                                        val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   424→                                        val progress = 35 + (completedCount * 55 / totalSegments)
   425→                                        val remainingTime = estimateRemainingTime(completedCount - 1, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime)
   426→                                        updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   427→                                            "转录中 $completedCount/$totalSegments...", remainingTime, segmentStates, onProgress)
   428→                                    }
   429→
   430→                                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${result.words.size} 词)")
   431→                                    Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index transcribed: ${result.words.size} words, time=${transcriptionTime}ms")
   432→                                } else {
   433→                                    Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription failed: ${result?.error}")
   434→                                    failedSegments++
   435→
   436→                                    val errorBrief = when {
   437→                                        result?.error?.contains("API Key") == true -> "API Key错误"
   438→                                        result?.error?.contains("quota") == true -> "配额用尽"
   439→                                        result?.error?.contains("network") == true -> "网络错误"
   440→                                        else -> "转录失败"
   441→                                    }
   442→                                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, errorBrief)
   443→                                }
   444→
   445→                                segmentFile.delete()
   446→                            }
   447→                        }
   448→                    }
   449→                }
   450→
   451→                // 等待生产者和消费者都完成
   452→                try {
   453→                    producerJob.join()
   454→                    consumerJobs.awaitAll()
   455→                } catch (e: CancellationException) {
   456→                    producerJob.cancel()
   457→                    Log.d(TAG, "Pipeline cancelled by user")
   458→                    throw e
   459→                }
   460→            }
   461→
   462→            // 按时间排序所有单词
   463→            allWords.sortBy { it.s }
   464→
   465→            // 清理临时目录
   466→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   467→
   468→            if (allWords.isEmpty()) {
   469→                val failedDetails = segmentStates.entries
   470→                    .filter { it.value.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   471→                    .map { "段 ${it.key + 1}: ${it.value.message}" }
   472→                    .joinToString("\n")
   473→
   474→                WhisperResult(
   475→                    success = false,
   476→                    error = "❌ 所有分段转录失败\n\n" +
   477→                        "总段数: $totalSegments\n" +
   478→                        "失败: $failedSegments\n" +
   479→                        "成功: 0\n\n" +
   480→                        "失败详情:\n$failedDetails\n\n" +
   481→                        "建议解决方案:\n" +
   482→                        "1. 检查网络连接是否正常\n" +
   483→                        "2. 确认 Groq API Key 已正确配置\n" +
   484→                        "3. 查看是否有配额限制\n" +
   485→                        "4. 尝试减少并发转录数量"
   486→                )
   487→            } else {
   488→                val sentences = buildSentences(allWords)
   489→                val fullText = sentences.joinToString(" ")
   490→                val totalTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   491→
   492→                updateProgressWithStates(totalSegments, totalSegments, 100, "转录完成！", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   493→
   494→                Log.d(TAG, "Pipeline transcription complete: ${allWords.size} words, ${sentences.size} sentences")
   495→                Log.d(TAG, "Total time: ${formatTime(totalTime)}, Failed: $failedSegments/$totalSegments")
   496→
   497→                WhisperResult(
   498→                    success = true,
   499→                    text = fullText,
   500→                    words = allWords,
   501→                    detectedLang = effectiveLang ?: ""
   502→                )
   503→            }
   504→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   505→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   506→            Log.e(TAG, "Pipeline transcription error", e)
   507→            WhisperResult(
   508→                success = false,
   509→                error = "分段转录失败: ${e.message}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
   510→            )
   511→        }
   512→    }
   513→
   514→    /**
   515→     * 更新进度（带分段状态）
   516→     */
   517→    private fun updateProgressWithStates(
   518→        currentSegment: Int,
   519→        totalSegments: Int,
   520→        percent: Int,
   521→        message: String,
   522→        remainingSeconds: Long,
   523→        segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState>,
   524→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   525→    ) {
   526→        // 在消息中添加状态摘要
   527→        val completedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.COMPLETED }
   528→        val failedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   529→        val inProgressCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING }
   530→
   531→        val statusSummary = when {
   532→            failedCount > 0 -> " (成功$completedCount, 失败$failedCount)"
   533→            inProgressCount > 0 -> " (进行中$inProgressCount)"
   534→            else -> ""
   535→        }
   536→
   537→        onProgress(currentSegment, totalSegments, percent, message + statusSummary, remainingSeconds)
   538→    }
   539→
   540→    /**
   541→     * 提取音频段 - 带重试机制
   542→     */
   543→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(
   544→        inputFile: File,
   545→        outputFile: File,
   546→        startTime: Double,
   547→        duration: Double,
   548→        segmentIndex: Int
   549→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   550→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   551→
   552→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   553→            if (attempt > 0) {
   554→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex extraction, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   555→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * attempt)
   556→            }
   557→
   558→            try {
   559→                val success = extractAudioSegment(inputFile, outputFile, startTime, duration)
   560→                if (success) return@withContext true
   561→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   562→                Log.w(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction attempt $attempt failed: ${e.message}")
   563→                lastError = e
   564→            }
   565→        }
   566→
   567→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries", lastError)
   568→        false
   569→    }
   570→
   571→    /**
   572→     * 转录单个段 - 带重试机制，包括速率限制处理
   573→     */
   574→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentWithRetry(
   575→        segmentFile: File,
   576→        config: AIConfig,
   577→        segmentIndex: Int,
   578→        segmentDuration: Double,
   579→        lang: String?,
   580→        contextPrompt: String? = null
   581→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   582→        var lastResult: WhisperResult? = null
   583→        var actualAttempts = 0
   584→        val maxAttempts = MAX_RETRIES + 2  // 额外允许2次429重试
   585→
   586→        while (actualAttempts < maxAttempts) {
   587→            if (actualAttempts > 0) {
   588→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex transcription, attempt $actualAttempts")
   589→            }
   590→
   591→            val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(segmentFile, config, lang, contextPrompt)
   592→            if (result?.success == true) {
   593→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   594→                return@withContext result
   595→            }
   596→
   597→            // 检查是否是速率限制错误（429）- 等待API指定时间后重试，不计入常规重试
   598→            if (result?.error?.contains("Rate limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   599→                result?.error?.contains("rate_limit", ignoreCase = true) == true) {
   600→                val isRateLimit = whisperService.isRateLimitError(result.error)
   601→                val waitSeconds = if (isRateLimit.first && isRateLimit.second > 0) {
   602→                    isRateLimit.second + 2  // 多等2秒确保配额恢复
   603→                } else {
   604→                    30  // 默认等30秒
   605→                }
   606→                Log.w(TAG, "Rate limit on segment $segmentIndex, waiting ${waitSeconds}s before retry")
   607→                delay(waitSeconds * 1000L)
   608→                actualAttempts++
   609→                continue
   610→            }
   611→
   612→            // 非429错误，正常重试
   613→            actualAttempts++
   614→            if (actualAttempts < maxAttempts) {
   615→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * actualAttempts)
   616→            }
   617→            lastResult = result
   618→        }
   619→
   620→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex transcription failed after $actualAttempts attempts")
   621→        lastResult
   622→    }
   623→
   624→    /**
   625→     * 估算剩余时间（秒）
   626→     */
   627→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   628→        currentIndex: Int,
   629→        totalSegments: Int,
   630→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   631→        overallStartTime: Long
   632→    ): Long {
   633→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   634→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   635→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   636→        }
   637→
   638→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   639→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   640→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   641→
   642→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   643→    }
   644→
   645→    /**
   646→     * 格式化时间显示
   647→     */
   648→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   649→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   650→        return when {
   651→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   652→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   653→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   654→        }
   655→    }
   656→
   657→    /**
   658→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段（优化版）
   659→     * 1. 根据码率计算最大分段时长（确保不超过 API 文件大小限制）
   660→     * 2. 动态调整分段大小以最小化总段数
   661→     * 3. 在静音点处分段，避免在语句中间切断
   662→     */
   663→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0, dynamicSegmentDuration: Long? = null): List<AudioSegment> {
   664→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   665→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   666→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   667→        } else {
   668→            128.0
   669→        }
   670→
   671→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   672→        // 使用压缩后的比特率估算（24kbps）而不是原始比特率
   673→        val compressedBitrate = 12.0 // kbps（更新为12kbps，与压缩参数一致）
   674→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / (compressedBitrate * 1000.0))
   675→            .coerceAtMost((dynamicSegmentDuration ?: SEGMENT_DURATION).toDouble())
   676→
   677→        // 不低于 3 分钟（增加最小分段时长减少总段数）
   678→        val targetSegmentDuration = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(180.0) // 3分钟
   679→
   680→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: targetDuration=${targetSegmentDuration.toInt()}s, originalBitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, compressedBitrate=${compressedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, totalDuration=${duration.toInt()}s")
   681→
   682→        // 如果总时长不需要分段
   683→        if (duration <= targetSegmentDuration + 30) {
   684→            return listOf(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   685→        }
   686→
   687→        // 构建分段：在目标时长附近寻找自然断点
   688→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   689→        var currentStart = 0.0
   690→        var index = 0
   691→
   692→        while (currentStart < duration - 10) { // 剩余不足10秒就合并到上一段
   693→            val idealEnd = (currentStart + targetSegmentDuration).coerceAtMost(duration)
   694→
   695→            if (idealEnd >= duration - 10) {
   696→                // 最后一段，直接到结尾
   697→                segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, duration - currentStart))
   698→                break
   699→            }
   700→
   701→            // 实际分段时长（加 OVERLAP_DURATION 的重叠）
   702→            val segmentDuration = idealEnd - currentStart
   703→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, segmentDuration))
   704→
   705→            // 下一段从重叠点开始
   706→            currentStart = idealEnd - OVERLAP_DURATION
   707→            index++
   708→        }
   709→
   710→        // 如果循环结束但没有覆盖到末尾
   711→        if (segments.isEmpty()) {
   712→            segments.add(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   713→        }
   714→
   715→        Log.d(TAG, "Created ${segments.size} segments (optimized for speed)")
   716→        return segments
   717→    }
   718→
   719→    /**
   720→     * 提取音频段 - 重新编码确保兼容性
   721→     * 修复：使用 Opus 编码，压缩率更高，同等质量下文件更小，上传更快
   722→     */
   723→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   724→        inputFile: File,
   725→        outputFile: File,
   726→        startTime: Double,
   727→        duration: Double
   728→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   729→        try {
   730→            outputFile.parentFile?.mkdirs()
   731→
   732→            // Opus 编码：16kbps opus ≈ 24kbps aac 质量，文件小约33%
   733→            val commandStr = buildString {
   734→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   735→                append("-ss $startTime ")
   736→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   737→                append("-t $duration ")
   738→                append("-vn ")
   739→                append("-acodec libopus ")
   740→                append("-b:a 12k ")
   741→                append("-ac 1 ")
   742→                append("-ar 16000 ")
   743→                append("-application voip ")  // 语音优化模式
   744→                append("-compression_level 10 ")
   745→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   746→            }
   747→
   748→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   749→            Log.d(TAG, "Input file: ${inputFile.absolutePath}, size: ${inputFile.length()}")
   750→            Log.d(TAG, "Output file: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   751→
   752→            // 使用同步执行
   753→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   754→
   755→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   756→            val output = session.output
   757→
   758→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   759→            if (output?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
   760→                Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg output: ${output.substring(0, minOf(200, output.length))}")
   761→            }
   762→
   763→            // 检查输出文件（降低最小文件大小阈值，因为压缩后文件会更小）
   764→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 512
   765→
   766→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   767→            success
   768→
   769→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   770→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   771→            false
   772→        }
   773→    }
   774→
   775→    /**
   776→     * 压缩音频文件用于转录
   777→     * 优化参数：使用更高效的压缩设置
   778→     */
   779→    private suspend fun compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile: File): File? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   780→        try {
   781→            val tempFile = File(context.cacheDir, "compressed_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.ogg")
   782→
   783→            // Opus 编码：16kbps 语音优化，比 24kbps AAC 文件更小质量相当
   784→            val commandStr = buildString {
   785→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   786→                append("-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   787→                append("-vn ")
   788→                append("-acodec libopus ")
   789→                append("-b:a 12k ")
   790→                append("-ac 1 ")
   791→                append("-ar 16000 ")
   792→                append("-application voip ")
   793→                append("-compression_level 10 ")
   794→                append("-map_metadata -1 ")
   795→                append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
   796→            }
   797→
   798→            Log.d(TAG, "Compression command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   799→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   800→
   801→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   802→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && tempFile.exists() && tempFile.length() > 512
   803→
   804→            if (success) {
   805→                Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${tempFile.length()} bytes (from ${videoFile.length()} bytes)")
   806→                tempFile
   807→            } else {
   808→                Log.e(TAG, "Compression failed: return code ${returnCode?.value}, file exists: ${tempFile.exists()}, size: ${tempFile.length()}")
   809→                tempFile.delete()
   810→                null
   811→            }
   812→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   813→            Log.e(TAG, "Error compressing audio", e)
   814→            null
   815→        }
   816→    }
   817→
   818→    /**
   819→     * 获取视频信息
   820→     */
   821→    private fun getMediaInformation(file: File): com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformation? {
   822→        return try {
   823→            Log.d(TAG, "Getting media information for: ${file.absolutePath}")
   824→            val session: MediaInformationSession = FFprobeKit.getMediaInformation(file.absolutePath)
   825→
   826→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe return code: ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   827→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe state: ${session.state}")
   828→
   829→            if (session.returnCode?.value == 0) {
   830→                val info = session.mediaInformation
   831→                Log.d(TAG, "MediaInfo - Duration: ${info?.getDuration()}")
   832→                info
   833→            } else {
   834→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe failed with code ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   835→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe output: ${session.output}")
   836→                null
   837→            }
   838→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   839→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting media info", e)
   840→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   841→            null
   842→        }
   843→    }
   844→
   845→    /**
   846→     * 从单词构建句子
   847→     */
   848→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   849→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   850→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   851→
   852→        words.forEach { wt ->
   853→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   854→
   855→            // 检查句子结束
   856→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   857→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   858→                currentSentence.clear()
   859→            }
   860→        }
   861→
   862→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   863→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   864→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   865→        }
   866→
   867→        return sentences
   868→    }
   869→}
   870→
   871→/**
   872→ * 音频分段数据类
   873→ */
   874→data class AudioSegment(
   875→    val index: Int,
   876→    val startTime: Double,  // 段开始时间（秒）
   877→    val duration: Double     // 段持续时间（秒）
   878→)

  1118→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {

  1150→    /**

  1152→     * 支持 Evil0ctal/Douyin_TikTok_Download_API 的返回格式
  1153→     */
  1154→    private suspend fun fetchDouyinInfoWithApi(api: DouyinApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
  1155→        try {
  1156→            val request = Request.Builder()
  1157→                .url(api.endpoint)
  1158→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
  1159→                .header("Referer", "https://www.douyin.com/")
  1160→                .build()
  1161→
  1162→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
  1163→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
  1164→
  1165→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(500)}")
  1166→
  1167→            // 检查是否是HTML
  1168→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
  1169→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
  1170→            }
  1171→
  1172→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
  1173→
  1174→            // 格式0: Evil0ctal 混合解析 API 格式
  1175→            // {code: 200, msg: "success", data: {platform: "douyin", api_type: "web", video_data: {desc: "...", nwm_video_url: "..."}}}
  1176→            if (api.name == "douyin_wtf" && json.has("data")) {
  1177→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
  1178→                val videoData = data.optJSONObject("video_data")
  1179→
  1180→                if (videoData != null) {
  1181→                    // 优先使用无水印视频 URL
  1182→                    val videoUrl = videoData.optString("nwm_video_url")
  1183→                        ?: videoData.optString("wm_video_url")
  1184→                        ?: videoData.optString("play_addr")
  1185→                        ?: videoData.optString("download_addr")
  1186→
  1187→                    if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1188→                        val title = videoData.optString("desc")
  1189→                            ?: videoData.optString("title")
  1190→                            ?: "抖音视频"
  1191→
  1192→                        val author = videoData.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1193→                            ?: videoData.optString("author")
  1194→                            ?: videoData.optString("nickname")
  1195→
  1196→                        val cover = videoData.optString("cover")
  1197→                            ?: videoData.optString("origin_cover")
  1198→                            ?: videoData.optString("dynamic_cover")
  1199→
  1200→                        Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Successfully parsed Evil0ctal format")
  1201→                        return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1202→                            title = title,
  1203→                            downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1204→                            cover = cover,
  1205→                            duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1206→                            author = author
  1207→                        ))
  1208→                    }
  1209→                }
  1210→            }
  1211→
  1212→            // 检查响应状态码
  1213→            val code = json.optInt("code")
  1214→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
  1215→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
  1216→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
  1217→            }
  1218→
  1219→            // 解析视频数据 - 支持多种格式
  1220→            // 格式1: {code: 200, data: {video: [{play_addr: "..."}], desc: "..."}}
  1221→            if (json.has("data")) {
  1222→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
  1223→
  1224→                // 尝试获取视频 URL
  1225→                val videoData = data.optJSONArray("video")?.optJSONObject(0)
  1226→                    ?: data.optJSONArray("data")?.optJSONObject(0)
  1227→                    ?: data.optJSONObject("video_data")  // 支持 Evil0ctal 格式
  1228→                    ?: data
  1229→
  1230→                val videoUrl = videoData.optString("play_addr")
  1231→                    ?: videoData.optString("play_addr_https")
  1232→                    ?: videoData.optString("nwm_video_url")  // 无水印视频
  1233→                    ?: videoData.optString("wm_video_url")   // 有水印视频
  1234→                    ?: videoData.optString("url")
  1235→                    ?: videoData.optString("video_url")
  1236→                    ?: videoData.optString("download_addr")
  1237→
  1238→                val title = data.optString("desc")
  1239→                    ?: data.optString("title")
  1240→                    ?: videoData.optString("desc")
  1241→                    ?: videoData.optString("title")
  1242→                    ?: data.optString("text")
  1243→                    ?: "抖音视频"
  1244→
  1245→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && (videoUrl.startsWith("http") || videoUrl.startsWith("//"))) {
  1246→                    // 处理相对协议 URL
  1247→                    val finalUrl = if (videoUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$videoUrl" else videoUrl
  1248→
  1249→                    // 提取作者信息
  1250→                    val author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1251→                        ?: videoData.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1252→                        ?: data.optString("author")
  1253→                        ?: data.optString("nickname")
  1254→                        ?: videoData.optString("author")
  1255→                        ?: videoData.optString("nickname")
  1256→
  1257→                    val cover = data.optString("cover")
  1258→                        ?: data.optString("thumb")
  1259→                        ?: data.optString("origin_cover")
  1260→                        ?: data.optString("dynamic_cover")
  1261→                        ?: videoData.optString("cover")
  1262→                        ?: videoData.optString("origin_cover")
  1263→                        ?: videoData.optString("dynamic_cover")
  1264→
  1265→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1266→                        title = title,
  1267→                        downloadUrl = finalUrl,
  1268→                        cover = cover,
  1269→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1270→                        author = author
  1271→                    ))
  1272→                }
  1273→            }
  1274→
  1275→            // 格式3: 嵌套在 data.video 或 data.video.play_addr 中
  1276→            val nestedVideo = json.optJSONObject("data")?.optJSONObject("video")
  1277→            if (nestedVideo != null) {
  1278→                val videoUrl = nestedVideo.optString("play_addr")
  1279→                    ?: nestedVideo.optString("play_addr_https")
  1280→                    ?: nestedVideo.optString("download_addr")
  1281→                    ?: nestedVideo.optString("download_addr_https")
  1282→
  1283→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && (videoUrl.startsWith("http") || videoUrl.startsWith("//"))) {
  1284→                    val finalUrl = if (videoUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$videoUrl" else videoUrl
  1285→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1286→                        title = json.optJSONObject("data")?.optString("desc") ?: "抖音视频",
  1287→                        downloadUrl = finalUrl,
  1288→                        cover = nestedVideo.optString("cover") ?: nestedVideo.optString("origin_cover"),
  1289→                        duration = nestedVideo.optJSONObject("video")?.optLong("duration", 0L) ?: 0L,
  1290→                        author = json.optJSONObject("data")?.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1291→                    ))
  1292→                }
  1293→            }
  1294→
  1295→            // 无法获取视频链接
  1296→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1297→
  1298→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1299→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1300→            Result.failure(e)
  1301→        }
  1302→    }

    32→class VideoDownloadService(

    52→        data class ApiHealthStatus(
    53→            val isAvailable: Boolean,
    54→            val responseTime: Long,
    55→            val lastCheckTime: Long,
    56→            val errorMessage: String? = null
    57→        )
    58→
    59→        /**
    60→         * 检查 API 健康状态
    61→         * @param apiUrl API 端点 URL
    62→         * @return 如果缓存有效且 API 可用返回 true，否则返回 true（默认可用，需实际检测）
    63→         */
    64→        fun isApiHealthy(apiUrl: String): Boolean {
    65→            val cached = apiHealthCache[apiUrl]
    66→            if (cached != null && System.currentTimeMillis() - cached.lastCheckTime < HEALTH_CACHE_DURATION) {
    67→                return cached.isAvailable
    68→            }
    69→            return true // 没有缓存时默认可用
    70→        }
    71→
    72→        /**
    73→         * 更新 API 健康状态
    74→         * @param apiUrl API 端点 URL
    75→         * @param isAvailable 是否可用
    76→         * @param responseTime 响应时间（毫秒）
    77→         * @param error 错误信息（可选）
    78→         */
    79→        fun updateApiHealth(apiUrl: String, isAvailable: Boolean, responseTime: Long = 0, error: String? = null) {
    80→            apiHealthCache[apiUrl] = ApiHealthStatus(isAvailable, responseTime, System.currentTimeMillis(), error)
    81→            Log.d(TAG, "API health updated: $apiUrl -> available=$isAvailable, responseTime=${responseTime}ms")
    82→        }
    83→
    84→        /**
    85→         * 获取最佳 API（按响应时间排序，优先使用最快的可用 API）
    86→         * @param apis API 配置列表
    87→         * @param getUrl 从配置中获取 URL 的函数
    88→         * @return 排序后的 API 列表
    89→         */
    90→        fun <T> getBestApi(apis: List<T>, getUrl: (T) -> String): List<T> {
    91→            return apis.sortedBy { api ->
    92→                val url = getUrl(api)
    93→                val status = apiHealthCache[url]
    94→                if (status == null) 0L else if (status.isAvailable) status.responseTime else Long.MAX_VALUE
    95→            }
    96→        }
    97→
    98→        /**
    99→         * 清除过期的健康检查缓存
   100→         */
   101→        fun clearExpiredHealthCache() {
   102→            val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
   103→            apiHealthCache.entries.removeIf { now - it.value.lastCheckTime > HEALTH_CACHE_DURATION }
   104→        }
   105→
   106→        /**
   107→         * 获取所有 API 的健康状态（用于调试）
   108→         */
   109→        fun getApiHealthStats(): Map<String, ApiHealthStatus> {
   110→            return apiHealthCache.toMap()
   111→        }
   112→    }

   174→    /**
   175→     * 平台检测 - 参考 Electron 版本的 detectPlatform 函数
   176→     * 支持更多平台和短链接
   177→     */
   178→    fun detectPlatform(url: String): VideoPlatform {
   179→        val lowerUrl = url.lowercase()
   180→        return when {
   181→            // YouTube - 支持主域名和短链接
   182→            lowerUrl.contains("youtube.com") || lowerUrl.contains("youtu.be") -> VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   183→            // Bilibili - 支持主域名和 b23.tv 短链接
   184→            lowerUrl.contains("bilibili.com") || lowerUrl.contains("b23.tv") -> VideoPlatform.BILIBILI
   185→            // 抖音 - 支持多种域名
   186→            lowerUrl.contains("douyin.com") || lowerUrl.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> VideoPlatform.DOUYIN
   187→            // TikTok
   188→            lowerUrl.contains("tiktok.com") -> VideoPlatform.TIKTOK
   189→            // 微博
   190→            lowerUrl.contains("weibo.com") -> VideoPlatform.WEIBO
   191→            // 小红书
   192→            lowerUrl.contains("xiaohongshu.com") || lowerUrl.contains("xhslink.com") -> VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU
   193→            // 微信视频号 - 只匹配视频号专用域名
   194→            lowerUrl.contains("channels.weixin.qq.com") -> VideoPlatform.WECHAT
   195→            // 直接视频链接
   196→            lowerUrl.contains(".mp4") || lowerUrl.contains(".m3u8") || lowerUrl.contains(".mpd") -> VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   197→            // 未知平台
   198→            else -> VideoPlatform.UNKNOWN
   199→        }
   200→    }

   202→    /**
   203→     * 获取视频下载链接 - 主入口函数
   204→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 extract-info IPC 处理
   205→     */
   206→    suspend fun getVideoInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   207→        try {
   208→            withTimeout(DEFAULT_TIMEOUT) {
   209→                val cleanUrl = cleanUrl(url)
   210→                Log.d(TAG, "Processing URL: $cleanUrl")
   211→
   212→                val platform = detectPlatform(cleanUrl)
   213→                Log.d(TAG, "Detected platform: $platform")
   214→
   215→                when (platform) {
   216→                    VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> fetchYoutubeInfo(cleanUrl)
   217→                    VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> fetchBilibiliInfo(cleanUrl)
   218→                    VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> fetchDouyinInfo(cleanUrl)
   219→                    VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> fetchTiktokInfo(cleanUrl)
   220→                    VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU -> fetchXiaohongshuInfo(cleanUrl)
   221→                    VideoPlatform.WECHAT -> fetchWechatChannelsInfo(cleanUrl)
   222→                    VideoPlatform.DIRECT -> Result.success(
   223→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   224→                            title = "直接视频链接",
   225→                            downloadUrl = cleanUrl,
   226→                            cover = null,
   227→                            duration = 0L,
   228→                            author = null,
   229→                            platform = VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   230→                        )
   231→                    )
   232→                    else -> Result.failure(
   233→                        Exception(
   234→                            "❌ 不支持的平台\n\n当前链接: $cleanUrl\n\n支持的平台:\n• YouTube (youtube.com, youtu.be)\n• B站 (bilibili.com, b23.tv)\n• 抖音 (douyin.com)\n• TikTok (tiktok.com)\n• 小红书 (xiaohongshu.com, xhslink.com)\n• 微信视频号 (channels.weixin.qq.com)\n\n建议: 请使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   235→                        )
   236→                    )
   237→                }
   238→            }
   239→        } catch (e: Throwable) {
   240→            Log.e(TAG, "Error fetching video info", e)
   241→            val message = if (e is kotlinx.coroutines.TimeoutCancellationException) {
   242→                "解析超时，请检查网络连接后重试"
   243→            } else {
   244→                "获取视频信息失败: ${e.message}"
   245→            }
   246→            Result.failure(Exception(message, e))
   247→        }
   248→    }

   250→    /**
   251→     * 清理 URL - 移除多余空格和无效字符
   252→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 cleanUrl 函数
   253→     */
   254→    private fun cleanUrl(url: String): String {
   255→        val trimmed = url.trim()
   256→        // 提取第一个有效的 HTTP/HTTPS 链接
   257→        val match = Regex("(https?://[^\\s\"'<>]+)").find(trimmed)
   258→        return match?.value ?: trimmed
   259→    }

   261→    /**
   262→     * 获取 YouTube 视频信息 - 改进版，使用 InnerTube API
   263→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：
   264→     * - ViMusic: https://github.com/vfsfitvnm/ViMusic (InnerTube 实现)
   265→     * - NewPipeExtractor: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
   266→     */
   267→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   268→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching YouTube info for: $url")
   269→
   270→        // 策略1: 尝试 NewPipeExtractor（v0.26.0 已修复低版本 Android 兼容性）
   271→        val newPipeResult = fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url)
   272→        if (newPipeResult.isSuccess) {
   273→            Log.d(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor success")
   274→            return newPipeResult
   275→        }
   276→        Log.w(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor failed: ${newPipeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   277→
   278→        // 策略2: 尝试 InnerTube API（备用）
   279→        val innertubeResult = fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url)
   280→        if (innertubeResult.isSuccess) {
   281→            Log.d(TAG, "InnerTube API success")
   282→            return innertubeResult
   283→        }
   284→        Log.w(TAG, "InnerTube API failed: ${innertubeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   285→
   286→        // 策略3: 尝试第三方API（最后备用）
   287→        return fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url)
   288→    }

   290→    /**
   291→     * 使用 NewPipeExtractor 解析 YouTube 视频
   292→     * 这是专门为 Android 设计的库，不依赖 YouTube API
   293→     */
   294→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   295→        try {
   296→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   297→                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   298→
   299→            Log.d(TAG, "Using NewPipeExtractor for YouTube: $videoId")
   300→
   301→            // 使用标准 YouTube URL 格式
   302→            val standardUrl = "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=$videoId"
   303→            val streamInfo = org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.stream.StreamInfo.getInfo(standardUrl)
   304→
   305→            // 优先使用混合流（视频+音频合一），文件更小下载更快
   306→            // 限制最高 720p，平衡画质和下载速度
   307→            val videoStream = streamInfo.videoStreams
   308→                .filter { !it.isVideoOnly }
   309→                .filter { (it.getResolution()?.replace("p", "")?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0) <= 720 }
   310→                .maxByOrNull { it.getResolution()?.replace("p", "")?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0 }
   311→
   312→            // 如果没有 720p 以下的混合流，放宽到所有混合流
   313→            val fallbackStream = videoStream ?: streamInfo.videoStreams
   314→                .filter { !it.isVideoOnly }
   315→                .maxByOrNull { it.getResolution()?.replace("p", "")?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0 }
   316→
   317→            // 只有在完全没有混合流时才用 DASH
   318→            val videoOnlyStream = if (fallbackStream == null) {
   319→                streamInfo.videoOnlyStreams
   320→                    .filter { (it.getResolution()?.replace("p", "")?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0) <= 720 }
   321→                    .maxByOrNull { it.getResolution()?.replace("p", "")?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0 }
   322→                    ?: streamInfo.videoOnlyStreams
   323→                        .maxByOrNull { it.getResolution()?.replace("p", "")?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0 }
   324→            } else null
   325→
   326→            val audioStream = if (videoOnlyStream != null) {
   327→                streamInfo.audioStreams.maxByOrNull { it.averageBitrate }
   328→            } else null
   329→
   330→            val bestVideo = fallbackStream ?: videoOnlyStream
   331→            val bestAudio = if (fallbackStream != null) null else audioStream
   332→
   333→            Log.d(TAG, "NewPipe streams - video: ${streamInfo.videoStreams.size}, videoOnly: ${streamInfo.videoOnlyStreams.size}, audio: ${streamInfo.audioStreams.size}")
   334→            Log.d(TAG, "NewPipe selected: ${bestVideo?.getResolution()}, mixed=${fallbackStream != null}, URL: ${bestVideo?.content?.take(100)}")
   335→
   336→            if (bestVideo != null) {
   337→                Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   338→                    title = streamInfo.name ?: "YouTube 视频",
   339→                    downloadUrl = bestVideo.content ?: "",
   340→                    cover = streamInfo.thumbnails?.firstOrNull()?.url,
   341→                    duration = streamInfo.duration,
   342→                    author = streamInfo.uploaderName,
   343→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE,
   344→                    audioUrl = bestAudio?.content
   345→                ))
   346→            } else {
   347→                Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流"))
   348→            }
   349→        } catch (e: Throwable) {
   350→            // 捕获 Throwable 而非 Exception，因为 NewPipe 可能抛出 NoSuchMethodError 等
   351→            Log.e(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor error", e)
   352→            Result.failure(Exception("NewPipe解析失败: ${e.message}", e))
   353→        }
   354→    }
   355→
   356→    /**
   357→     * 使用 YouTube InnerTube API 解析
   358→     * 使用 ANDROID 客户端身份请求 googleapis 端点
   359→     */
   360→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   361→        try {
   362→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   363→            if (videoId == null) {
   364→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取视频ID"))
   365→            }
   366→            Log.d(TAG, "YouTube video ID: $videoId")
   367→
   368→            // InnerTube API 请求 - 使用 TV 嵌入式播放器客户端（不需要 PoToken）
   369→            val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
   370→                put("context", JSONObject().apply {
   371→                    put("client", JSONObject().apply {
   372→                        put("clientName", "TVHTML5_SIMPLY_EMBEDDED_PLAYER")
   373→                        put("clientVersion", "2.0")
   374→                        put("hl", "en")
   375→                        put("gl", "US")
   376→                    })
   377→                    put("thirdParty", JSONObject().apply {
   378→                        put("embedUrl", "https://www.youtube.com/")
   379→                    })
   380→                })
   381→                put("videoId", videoId)
   382→                put("contentCheckOk", true)
   383→                put("racyCheckOk", true)
   384→            }.toString()
   385→
   386→            val request = Request.Builder()
   387→                .url("https://youtubei.googleapis.com/youtubei/v1/player?key=AIzaSyA8eiZmM1FaDVjRy-df2KTyQ_vz_yYM39w")
   388→                .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
   389→                .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0")
   390→                .header("X-YouTube-Client-Name", "85")
   391→                .header("X-YouTube-Client-Version", "2.0")
   392→                .post(requestBody.toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
   393→                .build()
   394→
   395→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   396→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   397→            val json = JSONObject(body)
   398→
   399→            // 检查播放状态
   400→            val playabilityStatus = json.optJSONObject("playabilityStatus")
   401→            val status = playabilityStatus?.optString("status")
   402→            if (status != "OK") {
   403→                val reason = playabilityStatus?.optString("reason") ?: "视频不可用"
   404→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("YouTube: $reason"))
   405→            }
   406→
   407→            val videoDetails = json.optJSONObject("videoDetails")
   408→            val title = videoDetails?.optString("title") ?: "YouTube视频"
   409→            val author = videoDetails?.optString("author") ?: ""
   410→            val lengthSeconds = videoDetails?.optLong("lengthSeconds") ?: 0L
   411→
   412→            val streamingData = json.optJSONObject("streamingData")
   413→
   414→            // 优先使用 adaptiveFormats（分离的音视频流，画质更好）
   415→            val adaptiveFormats = streamingData?.optJSONArray("adaptiveFormats")
   416→            var bestVideoUrl: String? = null
   417→            var bestAudioUrl: String? = null
   418→            var bestVideoBitrate = 0L
   419→            var bestAudioBitrate = 0L
   420→
   421→            if (adaptiveFormats != null) {
   422→                for (i in 0 until adaptiveFormats.length()) {
   423→                    val fmt = adaptiveFormats.getJSONObject(i)
   424→                    val mimeType = fmt.optString("mimeType", "")
   425→                    val fmtUrl = fmt.optString("url")
   426→                    val bitrate = fmt.optLong("bitrate", 0)
   427→
   428→                    if (fmtUrl.isEmpty()) continue // 跳过加密的流
   429→
   430→                    if (mimeType.startsWith("video/") && bitrate > bestVideoBitrate) {
   431→                        bestVideoBitrate = bitrate
   432→                        bestVideoUrl = fmtUrl
   433→                    } else if (mimeType.startsWith("audio/") && bitrate > bestAudioBitrate) {
   434→                        bestAudioBitrate = bitrate
   435→                        bestAudioUrl = fmtUrl
   436→                    }
   437→                }
   438→            }
   439→
   440→            // 如果 adaptiveFormats 没有可用的，回退到 formats（混合流）
   441→            if (bestVideoUrl == null) {
   442→                val formats = streamingData?.optJSONArray("formats")
   443→                if (formats != null && formats.length() > 0) {
   444→                    // 选择最高画质的混合流
   445→                    var bestBitrate = 0L
   446→                    for (i in 0 until formats.length()) {
   447→                        val fmt = formats.getJSONObject(i)
   448→                        val fmtUrl = fmt.optString("url")
   449→                        val bitrate = fmt.optLong("bitrate", 0)
   450→                        if (fmtUrl.isNotEmpty() && bitrate > bestBitrate) {
   451→                            bestBitrate = bitrate
   452→                            bestVideoUrl = fmtUrl
   453→                        }
   454→                    }
   455→                }
   456→            }
   457→
   458→            val thumbnails = videoDetails?.optJSONObject("thumbnail")?.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   459→            val cover = thumbnails?.let {
   460→                if (it.length() > 0) it.getJSONObject(it.length() - 1).optString("url") else null
   461→            }
   462→
   463→            if (bestVideoUrl != null) {
   464→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   465→                    title = title,
   466→                    downloadUrl = bestVideoUrl,
   467→                    cover = cover,
   468→                    duration = lengthSeconds,
   469→                    author = author,
   470→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE,
   471→                    audioUrl = bestAudioUrl
   472→                ))
   473→            }
   474→
   475→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流（可能需要签名解密）"))
   476→
   477→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   478→            Log.e(TAG, "InnerTube API error", e)
   479→            Result.failure(e)
   480→        }
   481→    }

   510→    /**
   511→     * 使用指定 API 获取 YouTube 视频信息
   512→     */
   513→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfoWithApi(
   514→        url: String,
   515→        api: YoutubeApiConfig
   516→    ): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   517→        try {
   518→            when (api.name) {
   519→                "lemnoslife" -> {
   520→                    // 使用 Lemnoslife API
   521→                    val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   522→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   523→
   524→                    val request = Request.Builder()
   525→                        .url("${api.endpoint}?id=$videoId")
   526→                        .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   527→                        .build()
   528→
   529→                    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   530→                    val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   531→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   532→
   533→                    Log.d(TAG, "Lemnoslife API response: ${responseBody.take(200)}")
   534→
   535→                    val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   536→                    if (!json.has("items") || json.getJSONArray("items").length() == 0) {
   537→                        return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("视频不存在或不可用"))
   538→                    }
   539→
   540→                    val items = json.getJSONArray("items")
   541→                    val video = items.getJSONObject(0)
   542→

   549→                            cover = video.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   550→                                ?.optJSONObject(0)

   552→                            duration = video.optLong("durationSeconds", 0L),
   553→                            author = video.optJSONArray("channel")
   554→                                ?.optJSONObject(0)
   555→                                ?.optString("name"),
   556→                            platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   557→                        )
   558→                    )
   559→                }
   560→                "noembed" -> {
   561→                    // 使用 NoEmbed API（主要用于获取元数据）
   562→                    val request = Request.Builder()
   563→                        .url(api.endpoint)
   564→                        .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())

   566→
   567→                    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   568→                    val responseBody = response.body?.string()

   570→
   571→                    Log.d(TAG, "NoEmbed API response: ${responseBody.take(200)}")
   572→
   573→                    val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   574→                    val title = json.optString("title", "YouTube 视频")
   575→                    val author = json.optString("author_name")

   577→                    Result.success(
   578→                        VideoDownloadInfo(

   580→                            downloadUrl = url, // NoEmbed 不提供下载链接
   581→                            cover = json.optString("thumbnail_url"),
   582→                            duration = 0L,
   583→                            author = author,
   584→                            platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   585→                        )
   586→                    )
   587→                }
   588→                else -> Result.failure(Exception("未知 API"))
   589→            }
   590→        } catch (e: Exception) {

   592→            Result.failure(e)

   596→    /**
   597→     * 提取 B站视频标识（BV号或av号）
   598→     * 支持 BV 号、av 号和 b23.tv 短链接
   599→     */
   600→    private fun extractBVID(url: String): String? {
   601→        // 优先匹配 BV 号
   602→        val bvPattern = Regex("(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]{10})")
   603→        val bvMatch = bvPattern.find(url)
   604→        if (bvMatch != null) return bvMatch.groupValues[1]
   605→
   606→        // 匹配 av 号（转换为请求参数用）
   607→        val avPattern = Regex("av(\\d+)", RegexOption.IGNORE_CASE)
   608→        val avMatch = avPattern.find(url)
   609→        if (avMatch != null) return "av${avMatch.groupValues[1]}"
   610→
   611→        return null
   612→    }

   614→    /**

   617→    private suspend fun resolveB23ShortLink(url: String): String? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   618→        try {
   619→            val noRedirectClient = OkHttpClient.Builder()
   620→                .connectTimeout(10, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
   621→                .readTimeout(10, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
   622→                .followRedirects(false)
   623→                .build()
   624→
   625→            val request = Request.Builder()
   626→                .url(url)
   627→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   628→                .build()
   629→
   630→            val response = noRedirectClient.newCall(request).execute()
   631→            val location = response.header("Location")
   632→            response.close()
   633→            location
   634→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   635→            Log.e(TAG, "Failed to resolve b23.tv short link", e)
   636→            null
   637→        }

   644→    private fun extractYoutubeVideoId(url: String): String? {
   645→        val patterns = listOf(

   647→            Regex("youtu\\.be/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   648→            Regex("youtube\\.com/embed/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   649→            Regex("youtube\\.com/shorts/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),

   651→            Regex("youtube\\.com/live/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")
   652→        )

   654→        for (pattern in patterns) {
   655→            val match = pattern.find(url)

   709→    /**
   710→     * 获取 B站视频信息 - 改进版，优先使用官方API
   711→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：bilibili-api Kotlin 库实现
   712→     *
   713→     * 策略：
   714→     * 1. 优先使用 B站官方 API
   715→     * 2. 官方API失败后，尝试第三方API作为备用
   716→     */
   717→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   718→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Bilibili info for: $url")
   719→
   720→        // 策略1: 尝试官方API
   721→        val officialResult = fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url)
   722→        if (officialResult.isSuccess) {
   723→            Log.d(TAG, "Official API success")
   724→            return officialResult
   725→        }
   726→        Log.w(TAG, "Official API failed: ${officialResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   727→
   728→        // 策略2: 尝试第三方API（备用）
   729→        return fetchBilibiliThirdPartyAPI(url)
