   731→
   732→    /**
   733→     * 使用 B站官方 API 解析
   734→     * 参考 bilibili-api (Kotlin): https://github.com/czp3009/bilibili-api
   735→     *
   736→     * API 端点：
   737→     * - 视频信息: https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid={bvid}
   738→     * - 播放地址: https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid={bvid}&cid={cid}
   739→     */
   740→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   741→        try {
   742→            // 1. 如果是 b23.tv 短链接，先解析真实 URL
   743→            var realUrl = url
   744→            if (url.contains("b23.tv")) {
   745→                val resolved = resolveB23ShortLink(url)
   746→                if (resolved != null) {
   747→                    realUrl = resolved
   748→                    Log.d(TAG, "Resolved b23.tv -> $realUrl")
   749→                } else {
   750→                    return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法解析b23.tv短链接"))
   751→                }
   752→            }
   753→
   754→            // 2. 提取视频标识（BV号或av号）
   755→            val videoId = extractBVID(realUrl)
   756→            if (videoId == null) {
   757→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取BV号或av号"))
   758→            }
   759→            Log.d(TAG, "Video ID: $videoId")
   760→
   761→            // 获取Cookie（如果有配置）
   762→            val cookie = getCookieForPlatform(url)
   763→            if (cookie != null) {
   764→                Log.d(TAG, "Using configured cookies for Bilibili API")
   765→            }
   766→
   767→            // 3. 获取视频信息（获取 cid）- 支持 BV 号和 av 号
   768→            val infoUrl = if (videoId.startsWith("av")) {
   769→                "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?aid=${videoId.removePrefix("av")}"
   770→            } else {
   771→                "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid=$videoId"
   772→            }
   773→            val infoRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   774→                .url(infoUrl)
   775→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   776→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   777→
   778→            // 添加Cookie
   779→            if (cookie != null) {
   780→                infoRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   781→            }
   782→
   783→            val infoRequest = infoRequestBuilder.build()
   784→
   785→            val infoResponse = client.newCall(infoRequest).execute()
   786→            val infoBody = infoResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   787→            val infoJson = JSONObject(infoBody)
   788→
   789→            if (infoJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   790→                val errorMsg = infoJson.optString("message")
   791→                // 检查是否是需要Cookie的错误
   792→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   793→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   794→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   795→                    )
   796→                }
   797→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API错误: $errorMsg"))
   798→            }
   799→
   800→            val data = infoJson.getJSONObject("data")
   801→            val cid = data.optLong("cid")
   802→            val title = data.optString("title")
   803→            val cover = data.optString("pic").replace("\\/\\\\/", "/")
   804→            val duration = data.optInt("duration")
   805→            val author = data.optJSONObject("owner")?.optString("name") ?: "未知UP主"
   806→
   807→            Log.d(TAG, "Video info: $title, cid=$cid")
   808→
   809→            // 4. 获取播放URL - 使用DASH格式（fnval=4048支持全部格式）
   810→            val bvParam = if (videoId.startsWith("av")) "avid=${videoId.removePrefix("av")}" else "bvid=$videoId"
   811→            val playUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?$bvParam&cid=$cid&qn=116&fnval=4048&fnver=0&fourk=1"
   812→            val playRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   813→                .url(playUrl)
   814→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   815→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   816→
   817→            if (cookie != null) {
   818→                playRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   819→            }
   820→
   821→            val playRequest = playRequestBuilder.build()
   822→            val playResponse = client.newCall(playRequest).execute()
   823→            val playBody = playResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   824→            val playJson = JSONObject(playBody)
   825→
   826→            if (playJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   827→                val errorMsg = playJson.optString("message")
   828→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   829→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   830→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   831→                    )
   832→                }
   833→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("获取播放URL失败: $errorMsg"))
   834→            }
   835→
   836→            val playData = playJson.getJSONObject("data")
   837→            val dash = playData.optJSONObject("dash")
   838→            val durl = playData.optJSONArray("durl")
   839→
   840→            var videoUrl: String? = null
   841→            var audioUrl: String? = null
   842→
   843→            if (durl != null && durl.length() > 0) {
   844→                // MP4格式（包含音视频）
   845→                videoUrl = durl.getJSONObject(0).optString("url")
   846→            } else if (dash != null) {
   847→                // DASH格式 - 选择最佳画质的视频流
   848→                val dashVideo = dash.optJSONArray("video")
   849→                val dashAudio = dash.optJSONArray("audio")
   850→
   851→                if (dashVideo != null && dashVideo.length() > 0) {
   852→                    // 按bandwidth降序选择最佳画质（优先选择高码率）
   853→                    var bestBandwidth = 0L
   854→                    for (i in 0 until dashVideo.length()) {
   855→                        val v = dashVideo.getJSONObject(i)
   856→                        val bw = v.optLong("bandwidth", 0)
   857→                        if (bw > bestBandwidth) {
   858→                            bestBandwidth = bw
   859→                            videoUrl = v.optString("baseUrl").takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
   860→                                ?: v.optString("base_url")
   861→                        }
   862→                    }
   863→                    // 选择最佳音频质量
   864→                    if (dashAudio != null && dashAudio.length() > 0) {
   865→                        var bestAudioBw = 0L
   866→                        for (i in 0 until dashAudio.length()) {
   867→                            val a = dashAudio.getJSONObject(i)
   868→                            val bw = a.optLong("bandwidth", 0)
   869→                            if (bw > bestAudioBw) {
   870→                                bestAudioBw = bw
   871→                                audioUrl = a.optString("baseUrl").takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
   872→                                    ?: a.optString("base_url")
   873→                            }
   874→                        }
   875→                    }
   876→                    Log.d(TAG, "DASH format: best video bandwidth=$bestBandwidth, hasAudio=${audioUrl != null}")
   877→                }
   878→            }
   879→
   880→            if (videoUrl != null) {
   881→                Log.d(TAG, "Got video URL from official API, cookies used: ${cookie != null}, hasAudio: ${audioUrl != null}")
   882→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   883→                    title = title,
   884→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   885→                    cover = cover,
   886→                    duration = duration.toLong(),
   887→                    author = author,
   888→                    cookies = cookie,
   889→                    platform = VideoPlatform.BILIBILI,
   890→                    audioUrl = audioUrl
   891→                ))
   892→            }
   893→
   894→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取播放地址"))
   895→
   896→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   897→            Log.e(TAG, "Official API error", e)
   898→            Result.failure(e)
   899→        }
   900→    }

   902→    /**
   903→     * 使用第三方API解析（备用方案）
   904→     */
   905→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliThirdPartyAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   906→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Bilibili info for: $url")
   907→
   908→        // 尝试多个API（按优先级排序）
   909→        val apis = listOf(
   910→            // API 1: xboba (稳定)
   911→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/bilibili/video/download?url=$url", "xboba"),
   912→            // API 2: 805t (备用)
   913→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.805t.cn/bilibili/api?url=$url", "805t"),
   914→            // API 3: y1les (备用)
   915→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.y1les.cn/api/bilibili?url=$url", "y1les"),
   916→            // API 4: xingzhige (备用)
   917→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.xingzhige.com/API/BiliBili/downUrl?url=$url", "xingzhige"),
   918→            // API 5: jiuling (备用)
   919→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.jiuling.xyz/bili/video?url=$url", "jiuling"),
   920→            // API 6: iktota (新增)
   921→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.iktota.com/api/bilibili?url=$url", "iktota"),
   922→            // API 7: yange (新增)
   923→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.yange.eu.org/bilibili/api?url=$url", "yange"),
   924→            // API 8: injahou (新增)
   925→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.injahou.cn/bilibili/api?url=$url", "injahou"),
   926→            // API 9: mnium (新增)
   927→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.mnium.cn/bilibili/video?url=$url", "mnium")
   928→        )
   929→
   930→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
   931→            try {
   932→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying Bilibili API: ${api.name}")
   933→
   934→                val result = fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api)
   935→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   936→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
   937→                    return result
   938→                }
   939→
   940→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   941→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   942→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
   943→            }
   944→        }
   945→
   946→        // 所有 API 都失败，返回详细错误信息
   947→        return Result.failure(
   948→            Exception(
   949→                "❌ B站解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• API 服务维护中或限流\n• 视频有地区限制\n• 会员专享内容\n• 视频已删除\n• 网络连接问题\n\n建议：\n• 稍后重试\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n• 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载"
   950→            )
   951→        )
   952→    }

   957→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api: BilibiliApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   958→        // 健康检查：跳过已知不可用的 API
   959→        if (!isApiHealthy(api.endpoint)) {

   962→        }

   967→                .url(api.endpoint)
   968→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   969→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   970→                .build()
   971→
   972→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   973→            val responseTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   974→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   975→
   976→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   977→
   978→            // 检查是否是HTML响应（API可能失效）
   979→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   980→                Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API returned HTML, may be invalid")
   981→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   982→            }
   983→
   984→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   985→
   986→            // 尝试多种返回格式解析
   987→
   988→            // 格式1: {data: {url: "...", title: "..."}}
   989→            if (json.has("data")) {
   990→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   991→                val videoUrl = data.optJSONArray("url")?.optString(0)
   992→                    ?: data.optString("url")
   993→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
   994→                    ?: data.optString("playurl")
   995→                    ?: data.optString("download_url")
   996→
   997→                val title = data.optString("title")
   998→                    ?: data.optString("name")
   999→                    ?: "B站视频"

  1504→            } catch (e: Exception) {
  1505→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
  1506→                updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, false, 0, e.message)
  1507→            }
  1508→        }
  1509→
  1510→        return Result.failure(
  1511→            Exception("❌ 小红书解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• 笔记是私密内容\n• 笔记已删除或不包含视频\n• API 服务限流\n• 链接格式错误\n\n建议：\n• 确认笔记链接有效且包含视频\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n• 在电脑上使用 res-downloader 等工具")
  1512→        )
  1513→    }
  1514→
  1515→    private suspend fun fetchXiaohongshuInfoWithApi(api: XiaohongshuApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
  1516→        try {
  1517→            val request = Request.Builder()
  1518→                .url(api.endpoint)
  1519→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
  1520→                .header("Referer", "https://www.xiaohongshu.com/")
  1521→                .build()
  1522→
  1523→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
  1524→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
  1525→
  1526→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
  1527→
  1528→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
  1529→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
  1530→            }
  1531→
  1532→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
  1533→
  1534→            // 检查响应状态码
  1535→            val code = json.optInt("code")
  1536→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
  1537→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
  1538→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
  1539→            }
  1540→
  1541→            // 解析视频数据 - 支持多种返回格式
  1542→            if (json.has("data")) {
  1543→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
  1544→
  1545→                // 尝试多种视频 URL 字段名
  1546→                val videoUrl = data.optString("url")
  1547→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
  1548→                    ?: data.optString("play_addr")
  1549→                    ?: data.optString("download_addr")
  1550→                    ?: data.optString("videoUrl")
  1551→                    ?: data.optString("stream")
  1552→                    ?: data.optString("masterStream")
  1553→
  1554→                // 尝试多种标题字段名
  1555→                val title = data.optString("title")
  1556→                    ?: data.optString("desc")
  1557→                    ?: data.optString("text")
  1558→                    ?: data.optString("note_title")
  1559→                    ?: data.optString("display_title")
  1560→                    ?: "小红书视频"
  1561→
  1562→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1563→                    // 尝试多种封面字段名
  1564→                    val cover = data.optString("cover")
  1565→                        ?: data.optString("thumb")
  1566→                        ?: data.optString("thumbnail")
  1567→                        ?: data.optString("image_list")
  1568→                        ?: data.optString("coverImage")
  1569→
  1570→                    // 尝试多种作者字段名
  1571→                    val author = data.optString("author")
  1572→                        ?: data.optString("nickname")
  1573→                        ?: data.optString("user_name")
  1574→                        ?: data.optString("userName")
  1575→                        ?: data.optJSONObject("user")?.optString("nickname")
  1576→                        ?: data.optJSONObject("user")?.optString("name")
  1577→
  1578→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1579→                        title = title,
  1580→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1581→                        cover = cover,
  1582→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1583→                        author = author
  1584→                    ))
  1585→                }
  1586→
  1587→                // 尝试从嵌套的 video 字段中获取
  1588→                val videoData = data.optJSONObject("video")
  1589→                if (videoData != null) {
  1590→                    val nestedVideoUrl = videoData.optString("url")
  1591→                        ?: videoData.optString("stream")
  1592→                        ?: videoData.optString("play_addr")
  1593→                        ?: videoData.optString("download_addr")
  1594→
  1595→                    if (nestedVideoUrl.isNotEmpty() && nestedVideoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1596→                        return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1597→                            title = data.optString("title") ?: data.optString("desc") ?: "小红书视频",
  1598→                            downloadUrl = nestedVideoUrl,
  1599→                            cover = videoData.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("cover"),
  1600→                            duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1601→                            author = data.optString("author") ?: data.optString("nickname")
  1602→                        ))
  1603→                    }
  1604→                }
  1605→            }
  1606→
  1607→            // 直接在根级别查找视频 URL
  1608→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
  1609→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
  1610→                ?: json.optString("play_addr")
  1611→
  1612→            if (directUrl.isNotEmpty() && directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1613→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1614→                    title = json.optString("title") ?: json.optString("desc") ?: "小红书视频",
  1615→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
  1616→                    cover = json.optString("cover") ?: json.optString("thumb"),
  1617→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1618→                    author = json.optString("author") ?: json.optString("nickname")
  1619→                ))
  1620→            }
  1621→
  1622→            Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1623→
  1624→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1625→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1626→            Result.failure(e)
  1627→        }
  1628→    }

  1630→    /**
  1631→     * 获取微信视频号视频信息
  1632→     *
  1633→     * 微信视频号解析方案（安卓限制）：
  1634→     * 由于安卓无法使用代理+证书方式，只能尝试第三方 API
  1635→     *
  1636→     * 参考项目：
  1637→     * - https://github.com/putyy/res-downloader (Go + Wails，多平台支持)
  1638→     * - https://github.com/ltaoo/wx_channels_download (注入下载按钮)
  1639→     *
  1640→     * 支持格式：
  1641→     * - https://channels.weixin.qq.com/...
  1642→     * - 视频号分享链接
  1643→     */
  1644→    private suspend fun fetchWechatChannelsInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
  1645→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching WeChat Channels info for: $url")
  1646→
  1647→        // 尝试多个第三方 API
  1648→        val apis = listOf(
  1649→            WechatApiConfig("https://api.pearktrue.com/api/v1/parse/wechat?url=$url", "pearktrue"),
  1650→            // 可以添加更多备用 API
  1651→            // WechatApiConfig("https://api.example.com/wechat?url=$url", "example")
  1652→        )
  1653→
  1654→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
  1655→            try {
  1656→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying WeChat API: ${api.name}")
  1657→                val result = fetchWechatChannelsInfoWithApi(api)
  1658→                if (result.isSuccess) {
  1659→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
  1660→                    return result
  1661→                }
  1662→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
  1663→            } catch (e: Exception) {
  1664→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
  1665→            }
  1666→        }
  1667→
  1668→        // 如果所有 API 都失败，返回友好错误
  1669→        return Result.failure(
  1670→            Exception(
  1671→                "❌ 微信视频号解析受限\n\n" +
  1672→                "由于微信视频号的特殊保护机制，安卓端暂不支持直接解析。\n\n" +
  1673→                "推荐方案：\n" +
  1674→                "1. 电脑端使用 res-downloader 工具\n" +
  1675→                "   https://github.com/putyy/res-downloader\n\n" +
  1676→                "2. 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n" +
  1677→                "   先在电脑下载后传输到手机\n\n" +
  1678→                "3. 录屏方式\n" +
  1679→                "   使用系统录屏保存视频"
  1680→            )
  1681→        )
  1682→    }

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.util.Log
     5→import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     8→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
     9→import okhttp3.Request
    10→import java.io.File
    11→import java.io.FileOutputStream
    12→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    13→import javax.inject.Inject
    14→import javax.inject.Singleton
    15→
    16→/**
    17→ * Sherpa-ONNX 模型下载和管理服务
    18→ *
    19→ * 模型存储位置: 用户选择的目录/models/sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/
    20→ * 模型文件:
    21→ *   - base-encoder.int8.onnx (~40MB)
    22→ *   - base-decoder.int8.onnx (~40MB)
    23→ *   - base-tokens.txt (~1KB)
    24→ */
    25→@Singleton
    26→class ModelManager @Inject constructor(
    27→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context
    28→) {
    29→    companion object {
    30→        private const val TAG = "ModelManager"
    31→        private const val MODEL_DIR_NAME = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base"
    32→        private const val PREFS_NAME = "model_manager_prefs"
    33→        private const val KEY_MODEL_PATH = "model_path"
    34→
    35→        // Sherpa-ONNX 模型下载地址
    36→        private const val BASE_URL = "https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/"
    37→        private const val ENCODER_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-encoder.int8.onnx"
    38→        private const val DECODER_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-decoder.int8.onnx"
    39→        private const val TOKENS_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-tokens.txt"
    40→
    41→        // 本地文件名
    42→        private const val LOCAL_ENCODER = "base-encoder.int8.onnx"
    43→        private const val LOCAL_DECODER = "base-decoder.int8.onnx"
    44→        private const val LOCAL_TOKENS = "base-tokens.txt"
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    48→        .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    49→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    50→        .followRedirects(true)
    51→        .build()
    52→
    53→    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences(PREFS_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    54→
    55→    /**
    56→     * 获取模型目录（优先使用用户设置的路径）
    57→     */
    58→    val modelDir: File
    59→        get() {
    60→            val customPath = prefs.getString(KEY_MODEL_PATH, null)
    61→            return if (customPath != null) {
    62→                File(customPath, "models/$MODEL_DIR_NAME")
    63→            } else {
    64→                File(context.filesDir, "models/$MODEL_DIR_NAME")
    65→            }
    66→        }
    67→
    68→    /**
    69→     * 设置模型存储路径
    70→     */
    71→    fun setModelPath(path: String?) {
    72→        prefs.edit().putString(KEY_MODEL_PATH, path).apply()
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    /**
    76→     * 获取当前模型路径
    77→     */
    78→    fun getModelPath(): String? = prefs.getString(KEY_MODEL_PATH, null)
    79→
    80→    /**
    81→     * 获取默认模型路径
    82→     */
    83→    fun getDefaultModelPath(): String = context.filesDir.absolutePath
    84→
    85→    /**
    86→     * 检查模型是否已下载
    87→     */
    88→    fun isModelDownloaded(): Boolean {
    89→        val dir = modelDir
    90→        return File(dir, LOCAL_ENCODER).exists() &&
    91→               File(dir, LOCAL_DECODER).exists() &&
    92→               File(dir, LOCAL_TOKENS).exists()
    93→    }
    94→
    95→    /**
    96→     * 获取模型总大小（MB）
    97→     */
    98→    fun getModelSizeMB(): Double {
    99→        if (!isModelDownloaded()) return 0.0
   100→        return modelDir.walkTopDown()
   101→            .filter { it.isFile }
   102→            .map { it.length() }
   103→            .sum() / 1024.0 / 1024.0
   104→    }
   105→
   106→    /**
   107→     * 下载模型文件
   108→     * @param onProgress (已下载字节, 总字节, 百分比, 当前文件名)
   109→     * @return Result<Boolean> 下载结果
   110→     */
   111→    suspend fun downloadModel(
   112→        onProgress: (Long, Long, Int, String) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _ -> }
   113→    ): Result<Boolean> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   114→        try {
   115→            val dir = modelDir
   116→            dir.mkdirs()
   117→
   118→            val files = listOf(
   119→                ENCODER_FILE to LOCAL_ENCODER,
   120→                DECODER_FILE to LOCAL_DECODER,
   121→                TOKENS_FILE to LOCAL_TOKENS
   122→            )
   123→
   124→            var totalDownloaded = 0L
   125→            val estimatedTotal = 80 * 1024 * 1024L
   126→
   127→            for ((remoteFile, localFile) in files) {
   128→                val targetFile = File(dir, localFile)
   129→
   130→                if (targetFile.exists() && targetFile.length() > 100) {
   131→                    Log.d(TAG, "File already exists: $localFile")
   132→                    totalDownloaded += targetFile.length()
   133→                    continue
   134→                }
   135→
   136→                Log.d(TAG, "Downloading: $remoteFile")
   137→                onProgress(totalDownloaded, estimatedTotal, (totalDownloaded * 100 / estimatedTotal).toInt(), localFile)
   138→
   139→                val url = BASE_URL + remoteFile
   140→                val request = Request.Builder().url(url).build()
   141→                val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   142→
   143→                if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   144→                    Log.e(TAG, "Download failed: ${response.code}")
   145→                    return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("下载失败: $remoteFile (HTTP ${response.code})"))
   146→                }
   147→
   148→                val body = response.body ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("空响应: $remoteFile"))
   149→                val tempFile = File(dir, "$localFile.tmp")
   150→
   151→                body.byteStream().use { input ->
   152→                    FileOutputStream(tempFile).use { output ->
   153→                        val buffer = ByteArray(8192)
   154→                        var bytesRead: Int
   155→
   156→                        while (input.read(buffer).also { bytesRead = it } != -1) {
   157→                            output.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead)
   158→                            totalDownloaded += bytesRead
   159→
   160→                            val percent = (totalDownloaded * 100 / estimatedTotal).toInt().coerceAtMost(99)
   161→                            onProgress(totalDownloaded, estimatedTotal, percent, localFile)
   162→                        }
   163→                    }
   164→                }
   165→
   166→                tempFile.renameTo(targetFile)
   167→                Log.d(TAG, "Downloaded: $localFile")
   168→            }
   169→
   170→            onProgress(totalDownloaded, totalDownloaded, 100, "完成")
   171→            Log.d(TAG, "All model files downloaded")
   172→            Result.success(true)
   173→
   174→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   175→            Log.e(TAG, "Download failed", e)
   176→            Result.failure(e)
   177→        }
   178→    }
   179→
   180→    /**
   181→     * 删除模型文件
   182→     */
   183→    fun deleteModel(): Boolean {
   184→        return try {
   185→            modelDir.deleteRecursively()
   186→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   187→            Log.e(TAG, "Failed to delete model", e)
   188→            false
   189→        }
   190→    }
   191→}

    19→@Singleton
    20→class VideoConfigStore @Inject constructor(
    21→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context
    22→) {
    23→    // B站相关配置
    24→    private val BILIBILI_SESSDATA = stringPreferencesKey("bilibili_sessdata")
    25→    private val BILIBILI_BILI_JCT = stringPreferencesKey("bilibili_bili_jct")

    49→    /**

    52→    data class VideoConfig(
    53→        val bilibiliSessdata: String? = null,

    69→    ) {
    70→        /**
    71→         * 获取B站的Cookie字符串
    72→         */
    73→        fun getBilibiliCookie(): String? {
    74→            return if (!enableCookieAuth) {
    75→                null
    76→            } else {
    77→                bilibiliFullCookie?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
    78→                    ?: buildString {
    79→                        bilibiliSessdata?.let { append("SESSDATA=$it; ") }
    80→                        bilibiliBiliJct?.let { append("bili_jct=$it; ") }
    81→                        bilibiliDedeuserid?.let { append("DedeUserID=$it; ") }
    82→                    }.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.trimEnd(' ', ';')
    83→            }
    84→        }
    85→
    86→        /**
    87→         * 获取YouTube的Cookie字符串
    88→         */
    89→        fun getYouTubeCookie(): String? {
    90→            return if (!enableCookieAuth) {
    91→                null
    92→            } else {
    93→                youtubeFullCookie?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
    94→                    ?: buildString {
    95→                        youtubeSid?.let { append("SID=$it; ") }
    96→                        youtubeHsid?.let { append("HSID=$it; ") }
    97→                        youtubeSapisid?.let { append("SAPISID=$it; ") }
    98→                        youtubeLoginInfo?.let { append("LOGIN_INFO=$it; ") }
    99→                    }.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.trimEnd(' ', ';')
   100→            }
   101→        }
   102→
   103→        /**
   104→         * 获取抖音的Cookie字符串
   105→         */
   106→        fun getDouyinCookie(): String? {
   107→            return if (!enableCookieAuth) {
   108→                null
   109→            } else {
   110→                douyinFullCookie?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
   111→                    ?: buildString {

   113→                        douyinSidGuard?.let { append("sid_guard=$it; ") }

   116→        }
   117→
   118→        /**
   119→         * 获取TikTok的Cookie字符串
   120→         */
   121→        fun getTiktokCookie(): String? {
   122→            return if (!enableCookieAuth) {

   132→
   133→        /**
   134→         * 检查是否配置了B站Cookie
   135→         */
   136→        fun hasBilibiliCookie(): Boolean {
   137→            return enableCookieAuth && (!bilibiliSessdata.isNullOrEmpty() || !bilibiliFullCookie.isNullOrEmpty())
   138→        }
   139→
   140→        /**

   143→        fun hasYouTubeCookie(): Boolean {
   144→            return enableCookieAuth && (!youtubeSid.isNullOrEmpty() || !youtubeFullCookie.isNullOrEmpty())
   145→        }
   146→
   147→        /**
   148→         * 检查是否配置了抖音Cookie

   150→        fun hasDouyinCookie(): Boolean {

   152→        }
   153→
   154→        /**
   155→         * 检查是否配置了TikTok Cookie
   156→         */
   157→        fun hasTiktokCookie(): Boolean {

   159→        }
   160→    }

   189→    suspend fun saveConfig(config: VideoConfig) {

   192→            config.bilibiliBiliJct?.let { prefs[BILIBILI_BILI_JCT] = it } ?: prefs.remove(BILIBILI_BILI_JCT)
   193→            config.bilibiliDedeuserid?.let { prefs[BILIBILI_Dedeuserid] = it } ?: prefs.remove(BILIBILI_Dedeuserid)
   194→            config.bilibiliFullCookie?.let { prefs[BILIBILI_FULL_COOKIE] = it } ?: prefs.remove(BILIBILI_FULL_COOKIE)
   195→            config.youtubeSid?.let { prefs[YOUTUBE_SID] = it } ?: prefs.remove(YOUTUBE_SID)
   196→            config.youtubeHsid?.let { prefs[YOUTUBE_HSID] = it } ?: prefs.remove(YOUTUBE_HSID)

    11→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
    12→import java.io.File
    13→import java.io.IOException
    14→import java.io.RandomAccessFile
    15→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    16→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
    17→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong
    18→import javax.inject.Inject
    19→import javax.inject.Singleton
    20→
    21→/**
    22→ * 分段下载管理器
    23→ * 支持大文件分段下载和断点续传
    24→ *
    25→ * 功能特性：
    26→ * - 支持大文件（>100MB）分段下载
    27→ * - 改进的断点续传（包含校验和）
    28→ * - 详细的进度回调（分段信息、速度、剩余时间）
    29→ * - 并发下载优化
    30→ * - 增强的错误处理和重试机制
    31→ * - 支持取消下载
    32→ */
    33→@Singleton
    34→class SegmentedDownloader @Inject constructor() {
    35→
    36→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    37→        .connectTimeout(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    38→        .readTimeout(300, TimeUnit.SECONDS) // 5分钟读超时，适合大文件下载
    39→        .writeTimeout(300, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    40→        .build()
    41→
    42→    // 每个分段的大小（5MB）
    43→    private val SEGMENT_SIZE = 5L * 1024 * 1024
    44→
    45→    // 最小分段大小（1MB，小于此文件不分段）
    46→    private val MIN_SEGMENT_SIZE = 1L * 1024 * 1024
    47→
    48→    // 大文件阈值（100MB，超过此值使用更大的分段）
    49→    private val LARGE_FILE_THRESHOLD = 100L * 1024 * 1024
    50→
    51→    // 大文件分段大小（10MB）
    52→    private val LARGE_SEGMENT_SIZE = 10L * 1024 * 1024
    53→
    54→    // 最大并发下载数
    55→    private val MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS = 4
    56→
    57→    // 最大重试次数
    58→    private val MAX_RETRY_COUNT = 5
    59→
    60→    // 最大分段数量
    61→    private val MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT = 20
    62→
    63→    /**
    64→     * 根据文件大小和网络状况计算最佳分段大小
    65→     * - 小文件（<50MB）：不分段
    66→     * - 中等文件（50-200MB）：5MB分段
    67→     * - 大文件（>200MB）：10MB分段
    68→     * - 超大文件（>500MB）：15MB分段
    69→     */
    70→    private fun calculateOptimalSegmentSize(fileSize: Long): Long {
    71→        return when {
    72→            fileSize < 50 * 1024 * 1024 -> fileSize // 不分段
    73→            fileSize < 200 * 1024 * 1024 -> 5 * 1024 * 1024
    74→            fileSize < 500 * 1024 * 1024 -> 10 * 1024 * 1024
    75→            else -> 15 * 1024 * 1024
    76→        }
    77→    }
    78→    // 重试延迟（毫秒）
    79→    private val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 3000L
    80→
    81→    // 当前下载的取消标志
    82→    private val currentCancellationFlag = AtomicBoolean(false)
    83→
    84→    // 下载速度采样窗口（用于动态调整分段大小）
    85→    private val speedSamples = mutableListOf<Long>()
    86→    private var lastSpeedUpdateTime = 0L
    87→
    88→    /**
    89→     * 下载进度回调
    90→     */
    91→    data class DownloadProgress(
    92→        val bytesDownloaded: Long,
    93→        val totalBytes: Long,
    94→        val percent: Int,
    95→        val speed: Long, // bytes per second
    96→        val segmentIndex: Int, // 当前分段索引（1-based）
    97→        val totalSegments: Int, // 总分段数
    98→        val completedSegments: Set<Int>, // 已完成的分段索引集合
    99→        val currentSegmentBytes: Long = 0, // 当前分段已下载字节数
   100→        val currentSegmentTotal: Long = 0, // 当前分段总字节数
   101→        val remainingTimeSeconds: Long = 0, // 预计剩余时间（秒）
   102→        val activeConnections: Int = 1 // 当前活跃连接数
   103→    )
   104→
   105→    /**
   106→     * 下载配置
   107→     */
   108→    data class DownloadConfig(
   109→        val url: String,
   110→        val outputFile: File,
   111→        val segmentSize: Long = 5L * 1024 * 1024, // 5MB
   112→        val enableResume: Boolean = true,
   113→        val maxRetries: Int = 3,
   114→        val concurrentDownloads: Int = 3,
   115→        val cookies: String? = null, // 添加Cookie支持
   116→        val audioUrl: String? = null, // 音频流URL（用于DASH格式）
   117→        val onProgress: (DownloadProgress) -> Unit = {},
   118→        val onSegmentComplete: (segmentIndex: Int, success: Boolean) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }
   119→    )
   120→
   121→    /**
   122→     * 分段状态信息
   123→     */
   124→    private data class SegmentState(
   125→        val index: Int,
   126→        val start: Long,
   127→        val end: Long,
   128→        val downloadedBytes: Long = 0,
   129→        val isCompleted: Boolean = false,
   130→        val checksum: Long = 0 // 简单校验和
   131→    )
   132→
   133→    /**
   134→     * 断点续传状态
   135→     */
   136→    private data class ResumeState(
   137→        val fileSize: Long,
   138→        val segmentSize: Long,
   139→        val segments: List<SegmentState>,
   140→        val timestamp: Long = System.currentTimeMillis()
   141→    )
   142→    suspend fun download(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   143→        try {
   144→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Starting download: ${config.url}")
   145→
   146→            // 如果有音频URL，使用音视频合并流程
   147→            if (config.audioUrl != null) {
   148→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Audio URL provided, using merge mode")
   149→                return@withContext downloadAndMerge(config)
   150→            }
   151→
   152→            // 获取文件大小
   153→            val fileSize = getContentLength(config.url)
   154→            if (fileSize <= 0) {
   155→                // 不支持分段下载，使用普通下载
   156→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Segmented download not supported, using simple download")
   157→                return@withContext simpleDownload(config)
   158→            }
   159→
   160→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "File size: $fileSize bytes")
   161→
   162→            // 判断是否需要分段
   163→            if (fileSize < MIN_SEGMENT_SIZE) {
   164→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "File too small for segmentation, using simple download")
   165→                return@withContext simpleDownload(config)
   166→            }
   167→
   168→            // 动态计算最佳分段大小，并确保分段数量不超过上限
   169→            var segmentSize = calculateOptimalSegmentSize(fileSize)
   170→            var segmentCount = ((fileSize + segmentSize - 1) / segmentSize).toInt()
   171→
   172→            // 如果分段数量超过上限，调整分段大小
   173→            if (segmentCount > MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT) {
   174→                segmentSize = (fileSize + MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1) / MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT
   175→                segmentCount = MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT
   176→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Adjusted segment size to $segmentSize to limit segments to $MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT")
   177→            }
   178→
   179→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Splitting into $segmentCount segments (size: $segmentSize bytes)")
   180→
   181→            // 创建临时文件
   182→            val tempFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".tmp")
   183→            val raf = RandomAccessFile(tempFile, "rw")
   184→            raf.setLength(fileSize)
   185→
   186→            // 下载每个分段 - 使用并行下载优化
   187→            val downloadedSegments = if (config.enableResume) {
   188→                loadResumeState(tempFile)
   189→            } else {
   190→                mutableSetOf()
   191→            }
   192→
   193→            val totalDownloaded = AtomicLong(0)
   194→            val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   195→            val failedSegments = mutableSetOf<Int>()
   196→            val segmentMutex = java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock()
   197→
   198→            // 计算需要下载的分段
   199→            val pendingSegments = (0 until segmentCount).filter { it !in downloadedSegments }
   200→
   201→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Pending segments: ${pendingSegments.size}/${segmentCount}, parallel: ${config.concurrentDownloads}")
   202→
   203→            // 并行下载分段
   204→            coroutineScope {
   205→                pendingSegments.chunked(config.concurrentDownloads).forEach { batch ->
   206→                    batch.map { i ->
   207→                        async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   208→                            val start = i * segmentSize
   209→                            val end = minOf(start + segmentSize - 1, fileSize - 1)
   210→
   211→                            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading segment $i: $start-$end")
   212→
   213→                            try {
   214→                                val success = downloadSegment(config.url, tempFile, start, end, config.cookies) { bytes ->
   215→                                    val currentTotal = totalDownloaded.addAndGet(bytes)
   216→                                    val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   217→                                    val speed = if (elapsed > 0) currentTotal / elapsed.toLong() else 0
   218→
   219→                                    // 记录速度样本
   220→                                    synchronized(speedSamples) {
   221→                                        speedSamples.add(speed)
   222→                                        if (speedSamples.size > 10) speedSamples.removeAt(0)
   223→                                    }
   224→
   225→                                    // 计算进度
   226→                                    val progress = ((currentTotal * 100) / fileSize).toInt().coerceAtMost(99)
   227→
   228→                                    config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   229→                                        bytesDownloaded = currentTotal,
   230→                                        totalBytes = fileSize,
   231→                                        percent = progress,
   232→                                        speed = speed,
   233→                                        segmentIndex = i + 1,
   234→                                        totalSegments = segmentCount,
   235→                                        completedSegments = downloadedSegments.toSet(),
   236→                                        activeConnections = batch.size
   237→                                    ))
   238→                                }
   239→
   240→                                if (success) {
   241→                                    segmentMutex.lock()
   242→                                    try {
   243→                                        downloadedSegments.add(i)
   244→                                        saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   245→                                    } finally {
   246→                                        segmentMutex.unlock()
   247→                                    }
   248→                                    true
   249→                                } else {
   250→                                    Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $i download failed after retries")
   251→                                    segmentMutex.lock()
   252→                                    try {
   253→                                        failedSegments.add(i)
   254→                                    } finally {
   255→                                        segmentMutex.unlock()
   256→                                    }
   257→                                    false
   258→                                }
   259→                            } catch (e: Exception) {
   260→                                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download segment $i", e)
   261→                                segmentMutex.lock()
   262→                                try {
   263→                                    failedSegments.add(i)
   264→                                } finally {
   265→                                    segmentMutex.unlock()
   266→                                }
   267→                                false
   268→                            }
   269→                        }
   270→                    }.awaitAll()
   271→                }
   272→            }
   273→
   274→            // 重试失败的分段（串行重试，更稳定）
   275→            if (failedSegments.isNotEmpty()) {
   276→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Retrying ${failedSegments.size} failed segments...")
   277→                val toRetry = failedSegments.toList()
   278→                failedSegments.clear()
   279→
   280→                for (i in toRetry) {
   281→                    val start = i * segmentSize
   282→                    val end = minOf(start + segmentSize - 1, fileSize - 1)
   283→
   284→                    try {
   285→                        val success = downloadSegment(config.url, tempFile, start, end, config.cookies) { bytes ->
   286→                            val currentTotal = totalDownloaded.addAndGet(bytes)
   287→                            val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   288→                            val speed = if (elapsed > 0) currentTotal / elapsed.toLong() else 0
   289→                            val progress = ((currentTotal * 100) / fileSize).toInt().coerceAtMost(99)
   290→
   291→                            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   292→                                bytesDownloaded = currentTotal,
   293→                                totalBytes = fileSize,
   294→                                percent = progress,
   295→                                speed = speed,
   296→                                segmentIndex = i + 1,
   297→                                totalSegments = segmentCount,
   298→                                completedSegments = downloadedSegments.toSet(),
   299→                                activeConnections = 1
   300→                            ))
   301→                        }
   302→
   303→                        if (success) {
   304→                            downloadedSegments.add(i)
   305→                            saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   306→                        }
   307→                    } catch (e: Exception) {
   308→                        Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Retry failed for segment $i", e)
   309→                    }
   310→                }
   311→            }
   312→
   313→            raf.close()
   314→
   315→            // 发送100%完成进度
   316→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   317→                bytesDownloaded = fileSize,
   318→                totalBytes = fileSize,
   319→                percent = 100,
   320→                speed = 0,
   321→                segmentIndex = segmentCount,
   322→                totalSegments = segmentCount,
   323→                completedSegments = downloadedSegments.toSet()
   324→            ))
   325→
   326→            // 重命名为最终文件
   327→            if (config.outputFile.exists()) {
   328→                config.outputFile.delete()
   329→            }
   330→            tempFile.renameTo(config.outputFile)
   331→
   332→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Download completed: ${config.outputFile.absolutePath}")
   333→            Result.success(config.outputFile)
   334→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   335→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Download failed", e)
   336→            Result.failure(e)
   337→        }
   338→    }
   339→
   340→    /**
   341→     * 下载并合并音频和视频流（用于DASH格式）
   342→     */
   343→    private suspend fun downloadAndMerge(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   344→        Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Starting audio+video merge download")
   345→
   346→        val videoFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".video.mp4")
   347→        val audioFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".audio.m4a")
   348→        val mergeOutputFile = config.outputFile
   349→
   350→        try {
   351→            // 更新进度：准备下载
   352→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   353→                bytesDownloaded = 0,
   354→                totalBytes = 100,
   355→                percent = 0,
   356→                speed = 0,
   357→                segmentIndex = 0,
   358→                totalSegments = 2,
   359→                completedSegments = emptySet()
   360→            ))
   361→
   362→            // 1. 下载视频流
   363→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading video stream...")
   364→            val videoConfig = config.copy(outputFile = videoFile, audioUrl = null)
   365→            val videoResult = simpleDownload(videoConfig)
   366→
   367→            if (videoResult.isFailure) {
   368→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download video: ${videoResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   369→                return@withContext Result.failure(videoResult.exceptionOrNull() ?: Exception("视频下载失败"))
   370→            }
   371→
   372→            // 更新进度：视频下载完成
   373→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   374→                bytesDownloaded = 50,
   375→                totalBytes = 100,
   376→                percent = 50,
   377→                speed = 0,
   378→                segmentIndex = 1,
   379→                totalSegments = 2,
   380→                completedSegments = setOf(0)
   381→            ))
   382→
   383→            // 2. 下载音频流
   384→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading audio stream...")
   385→            val audioConfig = config.copy(outputFile = audioFile, url = config.audioUrl!!)
   386→            val audioResult = simpleDownload(audioConfig)
   387→
   388→            if (audioResult.isFailure) {
   389→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download audio: ${audioResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   390→                // 音频下载失败，仍然尝试使用视频文件
   391→                videoFile.renameTo(mergeOutputFile)
   392→                return@withContext Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   393→            }
   394→
   395→            // 更新进度：准备合并
   396→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   397→                bytesDownloaded = 90,
   398→                totalBytes = 100,
   399→                percent = 90,
   400→                speed = 0,
   401→                segmentIndex = 2,
   402→                totalSegments = 2,
   403→                completedSegments = setOf(0, 1)
   404→            ))
   405→
   406→            // 3. 使用ffmpeg合并音频和视频
   407→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merging audio and video with ffmpeg...")
   408→            val mergeResult = mergeAudioVideo(videoFile, audioFile, mergeOutputFile)
   409→
   410→            if (mergeResult) {
   411→                // 清理临时文件
   412→                videoFile.delete()
   413→                audioFile.delete()
   414→
   415→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge completed: ${mergeOutputFile.absolutePath}")
   416→
   417→                // 发送100%完成进度
   418→                config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   419→                    bytesDownloaded = 100,
   420→                    totalBytes = 100,
   421→                    percent = 100,
   422→                    speed = 0,
   423→                    segmentIndex = 2,
   424→                    totalSegments = 2,
   425→                    completedSegments = setOf(0, 1)
   426→                ))
   427→
   428→                Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   429→            } else {
   430→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to merge audio and video, trying copy-only fallback")
   431→                // 尝试用 -c:a aac 重编码音频作为兜底
   432→                val fallbackCommand = buildString {
   433→                    append("-y -i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   434→                    append("-i \"${audioFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   435→                    append("-c:v copy -c:a aac -f mp4 ")
   436→                    append("\"${mergeOutputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   437→                }
   438→                val fallbackSession = com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKit.execute(fallbackCommand)
   439→                val fallbackSuccess = (fallbackSession.returnCode?.value == 0) && mergeOutputFile.exists() && mergeOutputFile.length() > 1024
   440→
   441→                if (fallbackSuccess) {
   442→                    videoFile.delete()
   443→                    audioFile.delete()
   444→                    Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Fallback merge succeeded with re-encoding")
   445→                    Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   446→                } else {
   447→                    // 兜底也失败，使用无音频的视频文件
   448→                    Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "All merge attempts failed, using video-only file")
   449→                    videoFile.renameTo(mergeOutputFile)
   450→                    audioFile.delete()
   451→                    Result.success(mergeOutputFile) // 视频可用但无音频
   452→                }
   453→            }
   454→
   455→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   456→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge download failed", e)
   457→            // 清理临时文件
   458→            if (videoFile.exists()) videoFile.delete()
   459→            if (audioFile.exists()) audioFile.delete()
   460→            Result.failure(e)
   461→        }
   462→    }
   463→
   464→    /**
   465→     * 使用ffmpeg合并音频和视频
   466→     */
   467→    private suspend fun mergeAudioVideo(videoFile: File, audioFile: File, outputFile: File): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   468→        try {
   469→            val command = buildString {
   470→                append("-y -i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   471→                append("-i \"${audioFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   472→                append("-c:v copy -c:a copy -f mp4 ")
   473→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   474→            }
   475→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "FFmpeg merge command: $command")
   476→
   477→            val session = com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKit.execute(command)
   478→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   479→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 1024
   480→
   481→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge result: $success, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   482→            success
   483→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   484→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "FFmpeg merge error", e)
   485→            false
   486→        }
   487→    }
   488→
   489→    /**
   490→     * 简单下载（不支持分段）- 带重试机制
   491→     */
   492→    private suspend fun simpleDownload(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   493→        val maxAttempts = config.maxRetries.coerceAtLeast(MAX_RETRY_COUNT)
   494→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   495→
   496→        for (attempt in 0 until maxAttempts) {
   497→            if (attempt > 0) {
   498→                val delayMs = RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt
   499→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Retry $attempt/$maxAttempts, delay ${delayMs}ms")
   500→                delay(delayMs)
   501→            }
   502→
   503→            try {
   504→                return@withContext downloadOnce(config)
   505→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   506→                lastError = e
   507→                val isConnectionError = e.message?.contains("connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   508→                                     e.message?.contains("Software caused connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   509→                                     e is java.net.SocketException ||
   510→                                     e is javax.net.ssl.SSLException
   511→
   512→                if (isConnectionError && attempt < maxAttempts - 1) {
   513→                    Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Connection error (attempt ${attempt + 1}), will retry: ${e.message}")
   514→                    // 删除可能不完整的文件
   515→                    if (config.outputFile.exists()) {
   516→                        config.outputFile.delete()
   517→                    }
   518→                    // 继续下一次尝试
   519→                } else {
   520→                    // 不可重试的错误或已达到最大重试次数
   521→                    break
   522→                }
   523→            }
   524→        }
   525→
   526→        if (lastError != null) {
   527→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Simple download failed after $maxAttempts retries", lastError)
   528→            Result.failure(lastError)
   529→        } else {
   530→            Result.failure(Exception("Download failed: unknown error"))
   531→        }
   532→    }
   533→
   534→    /**
   535→     * 执行一次下载尝试
   536→     */
   537→    private fun downloadOnce(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> {
   538→        // 添加完整的 headers 避免返回 403
   539→        val requestBuilder = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   540→            .url(config.url)
   541→            .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   542→            .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(config.url))
   543→            .header("Accept", "*/*")
   544→            .header("Accept-Language", "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8")
   545→            .header("Origin", getOriginFromUrl(config.url))
   546→            .header("Connection", "keep-alive")
   547→
   548→        // 添加Cookie（如果提供）
   549→        if (!config.cookies.isNullOrEmpty()) {
   550→            requestBuilder.header("Cookie", config.cookies)
   551→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Using custom cookies for download")
   552→        }
   553→
   554→        val request = requestBuilder.build()
   555→
   556→        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   557→
   558→        val contentType = response.header("Content-Type") ?: "unknown"
   559→        Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Response: code=${response.code}, contentType=$contentType, contentLength=${response.body?.contentLength()}")
   560→
   561→        // 检查是否返回了 HTML 而不是视频
   562→        if (response.isSuccessful && contentType.contains("text/html")) {
   563→            response.close()
   564→            throw Exception("服务器返回了网页而非视频文件，下载链接可能已失效")
   565→        }
   566→
   567→        if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   568→            val errorCode = response.code
   569→            val errorDetail = when (errorCode) {
   570→                403 -> {
   571→                    val urlHost = try {
   572→                        java.net.URL(config.url).host
   573→                    } catch (e: Exception) { "未知" }
   574→
   575→                    when {
   576→                        urlHost.contains("bilibili") -> {
   577→                            val hasCookie = !config.cookies.isNullOrEmpty()
   578→                            """
   579→                            HTTP 403 - B站下载被拒绝
   580→
   581→                            当前状态：${if (hasCookie) "已配置Cookie" else "未配置Cookie"}
   582→
   583→                            可能原因：
   584→                            ${if (hasCookie) "• Cookie已过期或无效\n• 视频需要更高权限\n• 下载链接已过期" else "• 视频需要登录才能下载\n• 视频是会员专享内容\n• 下载链接已过期"}
   585→
   586→                            解决方案：
   587→                            ${if (hasCookie) "1. 重新配置B站Cookie（可能已过期）\n2. 检查账号是否有该视频的访问权限" else "1. 点击「下载设置」配置Cookie\n2. 确保SESSDATA填写正确"}
   588→                            3. 或使用「导入本地视频」功能
   589→                            4. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载后再导入
   590→                        """.trimIndent()
   591→                        }
   592→
   593→                        urlHost.contains("youtube") || urlHost.contains("googlevideo") -> """
   594→                            HTTP 403 - YouTube下载被拒绝
   595→
   596→                            可能原因：
   597→                            • 视频有地区限制
   598→                            • 下载链接已过期
   599→                            • YouTube检测到自动化下载
   600→
   601→                            解决方案：
   602→                            1. 稍后重试（可能是临时限制）
   603→                            2. 使用「导入本地视频」功能
   604→                            3. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载后再导入
   605→                        """.trimIndent()
   606→
   607→                        else -> """
   608→                            HTTP 403 - 访问被拒绝
   609→
   610→                            可能原因：
   611→                            • 服务器拒绝访问
   612→                            • 需要认证才能下载
   613→
   614→                            解决方案：
   615→                            1. 使用「导入本地视频」功能
   616→                        """.trimIndent()
   617→                    }
   618→                }
   619→                410 -> "HTTP 410 - 下载链接已过期，请重新解析视频"
   620→                404 -> "HTTP 404 - 视频文件不存在，可能已被删除"
   621→                else -> "HTTP $errorCode - 下载失败"
   622→            }
   623→            throw IOException(errorDetail)
   624→        }
   625→
   626→        val body = response.body ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   627→        val inputStream = body.byteStream()
   628→        val totalBytes = body.contentLength()
   629→        var downloadedBytes = 0L
   630→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   631→
   632→        config.outputFile.outputStream().use { output ->
   633→            val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   634→            var bytes: Int
   635→
   636→            while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   637→                output.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   638→                downloadedBytes += bytes
   639→
   640→                val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   641→                val speed = if (elapsed > 0) (downloadedBytes / elapsed).toLong() else 0
   642→
   643→                if (totalBytes > 0) {
   644→                    config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   645→                        bytesDownloaded = downloadedBytes,
   646→                        totalBytes = totalBytes,
   647→                        percent = ((downloadedBytes * 100) / totalBytes).toInt().coerceAtMost(99),
   648→                        speed = speed,
   649→                        segmentIndex = 1,
   650→                        totalSegments = 1,
   651→                        completedSegments = emptySet()
   652→                    ))
   653→                }
   654→            }
   655→        }
   656→
   657→        // 发送100%完成进度
   658→        config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   659→            bytesDownloaded = config.outputFile.length(),
   660→            totalBytes = config.outputFile.length(),
   661→            percent = 100,
   662→            speed = 0,
   663→            segmentIndex = 1,
   664→            totalSegments = 1,
   665→            completedSegments = setOf(0)
   666→        ))
   667→
   668→        return Result.success(config.outputFile)
   669→    }

   671→    /**
   672→     * 下载单个分段 - 带重试机制
   673→     */
   674→    private fun downloadSegment(
   675→        url: String,
   676→        file: File,
   677→        start: Long,
   678→        end: Long,
   679→        cookies: String?,
   680→        onBytesDownloaded: (Long) -> Unit
   681→    ): Boolean {
   682→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   683→
   684→        repeat(MAX_RETRY_COUNT) { attempt ->
   685→            if (attempt > 0) {
   686→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end retry $attempt/$MAX_RETRY_COUNT")
   687→                try {
   688→                    Thread.sleep(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   689→                } catch (e: InterruptedException) {
   690→                    return false
   691→                }
   692→            }
   693→
   694→            try {
   695→                // 添加完整的 headers 避免返回 403
   696→                val requestBuilder = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   697→                    .url(url)
   698→                    .header("Range", "bytes=$start-$end")
   699→                    .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   700→                    .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(url))
   701→                    .header("Accept", "*/*")
   702→                    .header("Accept-Language", "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8")
   703→                    .header("Origin", getOriginFromUrl(url))
   704→
   705→                // 添加Cookie（如果提供）
   706→                if (!cookies.isNullOrEmpty()) {
   707→                    requestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookies)
   708→                }
   709→
   710→                val request = requestBuilder.build()
   711→                val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   712→
   713→                if (response.code !in 200..299) {
   714→                    val errorCode = response.code
   715→                    val urlHost = try { java.net.URL(url).host } catch (e: Exception) { "未知" }
   716→                    val errorMsg = when (errorCode) {
   717→                        403 -> {
   718→                            val hasCookie = !cookies.isNullOrEmpty()
   719→                            val isBilibili = urlHost.contains("bilibili") || urlHost.contains("bilivideo")
   720→                            if (isBilibili) {
   721→                                "HTTP 403 - B站下载被拒绝 ${if (hasCookie) "(已配置Cookie，可能已过期)" else "(未配置Cookie)"}"
   722→                            } else {
   723→                                "HTTP 403 - 下载被拒绝，可能需要Cookie或链接已过期"
   724→                            }
   725→                        }
   726→                        else -> "HTTP $errorCode - 分段下载失败"
   727→                    }
   728→                    throw IOException("$errorMsg (segment $start-$end)")
   729→                }
   730→
   731→                val inputStream = response.body?.byteStream() ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   732→                val raf = RandomAccessFile(file, "rw")
   733→                raf.seek(start)
   734→
   735→                val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   736→                var bytes: Int
   737→                var totalBytes = 0L
   738→
   739→                while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   740→                    raf.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   741→                    totalBytes += bytes
   742→                    onBytesDownloaded(bytes.toLong())
   743→                }
   744→
   745→                raf.close()
   746→                inputStream.close()
   747→                return true
   748→
   749→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   750→                lastError = e
   751→                val isConnectionError = e.message?.contains("connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   752→                                     e.message?.contains("Software caused connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   753→                                     e is java.net.SocketException ||
   754→                                     e is javax.net.ssl.SSLException
   755→
   756→                if (!isConnectionError || attempt >= MAX_RETRY_COUNT - 1) {
   757→                    Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end download failed", e)
   758→                    return false
   759→                }
   760→                Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end connection error, will retry: ${e.message}")
   761→            }
   762→        }
   763→
   764→        Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end failed after $MAX_RETRY_COUNT retries", lastError)
   765→        return false
   766→    }

   768→    /**
   769→     * 获取文件内容长度
   770→     */
   771→    private fun getContentLength(url: String): Long {
   772→        return try {
   773→            // 添加必要的 headers
   774→            val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   775→                .url(url)
   776→                .head()
   777→                .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   778→                .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(url))
   779→                .build()
   780→
   781→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   782→
   783→            // 检查是否支持断点续传
   784→            val acceptRanges = response.header("Accept-Ranges") == "bytes"
   785→            val contentLength = response.body?.contentLength() ?: 0
   786→
   787→            if (acceptRanges && contentLength > 0) {
   788→                contentLength
   789→            } else {
   790→                0
   791→            }
   792→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   793→            Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to get content length", e)
   794→            0
   795→        }
   796→    }

   798→    /**
   799→     * 保存断点状态
   800→     */
   801→    private fun saveResumeState(file: File, segments: Set<Int>) {
   802→        try {
   803→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   804→            stateFile.writeText(segments.joinToString(","))
   805→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   806→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to save resume state", e)
   807→        }
   808→    }
   809→
   810→    /**
   811→     * 加载断点状态
   812→     */
   813→    private fun loadResumeState(file: File): MutableSet<Int> {
   814→        return try {
   815→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   816→            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   817→                val content = stateFile.readText()
   818→                if (content.isNotBlank()) {
   819→                    content.split(",").mapNotNull { it.toIntOrNull() }.toMutableSet()
   820→                } else {
   821→                    mutableSetOf()
   822→                }
   823→            } else {
   824→                mutableSetOf()
   825→            }
   826→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   827→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to load resume state", e)
   828→            mutableSetOf()
   829→        }
   830→    }
   831→
   832→    /**
   833→     * 清理断点状态
   834→     */
   835→    fun clearResumeState(file: File) {
   836→        try {
   837→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   838→            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   839→                stateFile.delete()
   840→            }
   841→            val tempFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".tmp")
   842→            if (tempFile.exists()) {
   843→                tempFile.delete()
   844→            }
   845→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   846→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to clear resume state", e)
   847→        }
   848→    }
   849→
   850→    /**
   851→     * 取消下载并清理临时文件
   852→     */
   853→    fun cancelDownload(outputFile: File) {
   854→        clearResumeState(outputFile)
   855→    }
   856→
   857→    /**
   858→     * 根据URL获取对应的Referer
   859→     * B站、YouTube等网站需要正确的Referer才能下载
   860→     */
   861→    private fun getRefererFromUrl(url: String): String {
   862→        return when {
   863→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") || url.contains("bilivideo.com") -> "https://www.bilibili.com/"
   864→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") || url.contains("googlevideo.com") -> "https://www.youtube.com/"
   865→            url.contains("douyin.com") -> "https://www.douyin.com/"
   866→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> "https://www.tiktok.com/"
   867→            else -> url
   868→        }
   869→    }
   870→
   871→    /**
   872→     * 根据URL获取Origin
   873→     */
   874→    private fun getOriginFromUrl(url: String): String {
   875→        return when {
   876→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") || url.contains("bilivideo.com") -> "https://www.bilibili.com"
   877→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") || url.contains("googlevideo.com") -> "https://www.youtube.com"
   878→            url.contains("douyin.com") -> "https://www.douyin.com"
   879→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> "https://www.tiktok.com"
   880→            else -> {
   881→                // 从URL中提取origin
   882→                val uri = java.net.URL(url)
   883→                "${uri.protocol}://${uri.host}"
   884→            }
   885→        }
   886→    }
   887→}

     4→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.*
     5→import androidx.datastore.preferences.preferencesDataStore
     6→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     7→import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
     9→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
    10→import javax.inject.Inject
    11→import javax.inject.Singleton
    12→
    13→private val Context.aiDataStore by preferencesDataStore(name = "ai_config")
    14→
    15→@Singleton
    16→class AIConfigStore @Inject constructor(@ApplicationContext private val context: Context) {
    17→    private val PROVIDER = stringPreferencesKey("provider")
    18→    private val API_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("apiKey")
    19→    private val BASE_URL = stringPreferencesKey("baseUrl")
    20→    private val MODEL = stringPreferencesKey("model")
    21→    private val MAX_TOKENS = intPreferencesKey("maxTokens")
    22→    private val TEMPERATURE = doublePreferencesKey("temperature")
    23→    private val GROQ_WHISPER_ENABLED = booleanPreferencesKey("groqWhisperEnabled")
    24→    private val WHISPER_MODEL = stringPreferencesKey("whisperModel")
    25→    private val SUBTITLE_TRANSLATE_MODE = stringPreferencesKey("subtitleTranslateMode")
    26→    private val GROQ_API_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("groqApiKey")
    27→    private val TRANSCRIBE_LANGUAGE = stringPreferencesKey("transcribeLanguage")
    28→    private val TRANSCRIPTION_MODE = stringPreferencesKey("transcriptionMode")
    29→
    30→    val config: Flow<AIConfig> = context.aiDataStore.data.map { prefs ->
    31→        AIConfig(
    32→            provider = prefs[PROVIDER] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.provider,
    33→            apiKey = prefs[API_KEY] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.apiKey,
    34→            baseUrl = prefs[BASE_URL] ?: "",
    35→            model = prefs[MODEL] ?: "",
    36→            maxTokens = prefs[MAX_TOKENS],
    37→            temperature = prefs[TEMPERATURE],
    38→            groqWhisperEnabled = prefs[GROQ_WHISPER_ENABLED] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.groqWhisperEnabled,
    39→            whisperModel = prefs[WHISPER_MODEL] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.whisperModel,
    40→            subtitleTranslateMode = prefs[SUBTITLE_TRANSLATE_MODE] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.subtitleTranslateMode,
    41→            groqApiKey = prefs[GROQ_API_KEY] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.groqApiKey,
    42→            transcribeLanguage = prefs[TRANSCRIBE_LANGUAGE] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.transcribeLanguage,
    43→            transcriptionMode = prefs[TRANSCRIPTION_MODE] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.transcriptionMode
    44→        )
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    suspend fun save(config: AIConfig) {
    48→        context.aiDataStore.edit { prefs ->
    49→            prefs[PROVIDER] = config.provider
    50→            prefs[API_KEY] = config.apiKey
    51→            prefs[BASE_URL] = config.baseUrl
    52→            prefs[MODEL] = config.model
    53→            config.maxTokens?.let { prefs[MAX_TOKENS] = it } ?: prefs.remove(MAX_TOKENS)
    54→            config.temperature?.let { prefs[TEMPERATURE] = it } ?: prefs.remove(TEMPERATURE)
    55→            prefs[GROQ_WHISPER_ENABLED] = config.groqWhisperEnabled
    56→            prefs[WHISPER_MODEL] = config.whisperModel
    57→            prefs[SUBTITLE_TRANSLATE_MODE] = config.subtitleTranslateMode
    58→            prefs[GROQ_API_KEY] = config.groqApiKey
    59→            prefs[TRANSCRIBE_LANGUAGE] = config.transcribeLanguage
    60→            prefs[TRANSCRIPTION_MODE] = config.transcriptionMode
    61→        }
    62→    }
    63→
    64→    suspend fun setTranscribeLanguage(lang: String) {
    65→        context.aiDataStore.edit { prefs ->
    66→            prefs[TRANSCRIBE_LANGUAGE] = lang
    67→        }
    68→    }
    69→}
    70→
